title: Overcoming intrinsic material limitations through cavity feedback
summary: Magnons, the quanta of spin waves, have significant potential for use in modern technologies, especially when strongly coupled to another mode for read-out and control. However, while magnons strongly interact with microwave photons via the magnetic-dipole interaction to form hybrid cavity-magnon polariton modes, the weak magnetostrictive magnon-phonon interaction, together with large polariton linewidths dominated by magnon dissipation, has so far restricted magnonic-spheres to the weak-coupling regime. The material-limited magnon dissipation rate in particular has been regarded as an unavoidable limitation in these systems. Here, we surpass this long-standing limitation by implementing an active microwave feedback loop to suppress the linewidth of cavity-magnon polaritons and strongly suppress their effective decay rate below the magnon-limited linewidth, thereby enhancing the polariton-phonon cooperativity from C=1 to C=150. As a key milestone, we achieve normal-mode splitting between a cavity-magnon polariton and a mechanical mode, providing direct evidence of three-mode hybridization among photons, magnons, and phonons. Our results establish feedback as a general route to accessing strong-coupling regimes in systems previously thought to be limited by material properties and hence open new opportunities for coherent control in hybrid quantum systems.

AI.tldr: 通过主动微波反馈回路抑制腔磁极化激元线宽，实现光子、磁子、声子三模强耦合
AI.motivation: 磁子（自旋波量子）在现代技术中具有重要应用潜力，但磁致伸缩引起的磁子-声子相互作用较弱，且磁子耗散导致的极化激元线宽较大，限制了磁子系统进入强耦合区域。材料限制的磁子耗散率被认为是不可避免的限制。
AI.method: 采用主动微波反馈回路来抑制腔磁极化激元的线宽，将有效衰减率降低到磁子限制线宽以下，从而将极化激元-声子协同性从C=1提升到C=150。
AI.result: 实现了腔磁极化激元与机械模式之间的正常模式分裂，提供了光子、磁子和声子三模杂化的直接证据，首次在磁子系统实现了强耦合。
AI.conclusion: 反馈控制为突破材料性质限制、实现强耦合提供了通用途径，为混合量子系统中的相干控制开辟了新机会。

title: Adaptive tensor train metadynamics for high-dimensional free energy exploration
summary: A key challenge for molecular dynamics simulations is efficient exploration of free energy landscapes over relevant collective variables (CV). Common methods for enhancing sampling become prohibitively inefficient beyond only a few CVs; in the case of the widely-used metadynamics method, the computational cost of evaluating and storing the bias potential grows exponentially with the number of dimensions. Here, we introduce TT-Metadynamics, in which the accumulated sum of Gaussian functions in the original metadynamics method is periodically compressed into a low-rank tensor train (TT) representation. The TT enables efficient memory use and prevents the computational cost of evaluating the bias potential from increasing with simulation time. We present a "sketching" algorithm that allows us to construct the TT with linear scaling in the number of CVs. Applied to benchmark systems with up to 14 CVs, the accuracy of TT-Metadynamics matches or exceeds that of standard metadynamics in long simulations, particularly in systems with high barriers. These results establish TT-Metadynamics as a scalable and effective method for computing free energies that are functions of several CVs.

AI.tldr: TT-Metadynamics：通过张量列车压缩技术解决高维自由能面采样问题的元动力学方法，显著降低了计算和存储成本。
AI.motivation: 分子动力学模拟中，高效探索高维自由能面是一个关键挑战。传统元动力学方法在超过几个集体变量时，计算和存储成本呈指数增长，变得不可行。
AI.method: 将元动力学中累积的高斯函数和周期性地压缩为低秩张量列车表示，使用"sketching"算法实现线性缩放，保持偏置势能评估效率。
AI.result: 在最多14个集体变量的基准系统中，TT-Metadynamics的准确性达到或超过标准元动力学，特别是在高能垒系统中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: TT-Metadynamics为计算多个集体变量的自由能提供了一种可扩展且有效的方法，解决了高维采样中的计算瓶颈问题。

title: Microscopic geometric theory for gapped excitations in fractional topological fluids
summary: We propose a geometric description of all gapped excitations in fractional quantum Hall phases that reveals several fundamental understandings with experimental consequences. These include a duality between the Hilbert space of multiple gapped ``graviton-like" spin 2 excitations at $ν=1/3$ Laughlin phase, and that of non-Abelian quasiholes of an irrational Haffnian conformal field theory. This leads us to construct microscopic wave functions for multiple higher-spin gapped neutral modes in the Laughlin phase. Carrying spin $s \ge 2$, they emerge from higher-order geometric deformations of the topological ground state, and live within the Gaffnian conformal Hilbert space asymptotically. We show that the full many-body Hilbert space of an FQH phase can be generated from superpositions of such geometric deformations, supporting a concrete geometric interpretation of all gapped excitations. We analyse the scattering between these higher spin modes and conjecture that they can have a long lifetime, and propose methods for their experimental detection.

AI.tldr: 提出分数量子霍尔相中所有有隙激发的几何描述，揭示了几个具有实验意义的基本理解，包括Laughlin相中多个自旋2"类引力子"激发与无理Haffnian共形场论非阿贝尔准空穴之间的对偶性。
AI.motivation: 为分数量子霍尔相中的所有有隙激发提供几何描述，揭示其基本物理特性，并探索这些激发在实验中的可观测性。
AI.method: 通过几何描述方法，构建Laughlin相中多个高自旋有隙中性模式的微观波函数，这些模式来自拓扑基态的高阶几何形变，并渐近地存在于Gaffnian共形希尔伯特空间中。
AI.result: 发现分数量子霍尔相的全多体希尔伯特空间可以通过这类几何形变的叠加生成，支持对所有有隙激发的具体几何解释。分析了高自旋模式之间的散射，推测它们可能具有较长寿命。
AI.conclusion: 提出了分数量子霍尔相中有隙激发的几何框架，建立了Laughlin相中类引力子激发与非阿贝尔准空穴的对偶关系，为实验探测这些激发提供了理论基础和方法建议。

title: Hierarchical structure of primary and hybridization-induced superconducting correlations in bilayer nickelates
summary: High-pressure superconductivity in the bilayer nickelate La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$, with a transition temperature approaching 80 K, has stimulated intense debate regarding its microscopic origin. Although an $s_{\pm}$ gap symmetry has been widely proposed, the electronic degrees of freedom responsible for pairing remain unsettled. Here we investigate a bilayer two-orbital Hubbard model using the variational Monte Carlo method and reveal a hierarchical pairing structure in bilayer nickelates. The primary pairing interaction originates from the bonding--antibonding splitting of the Ni $3d_{z^2}$ orbitals, while orbital hybridization redistributes superconducting correlations to the $d_{x^2-y^2}$ channel despite its weak intrinsic pairing interaction. This distinction between the origin of pairing and resulting superconducting correlations explains why the two orbital channels exhibit comparable long-range correlations. The resulting $s_{\pm}$ state is robust against changes in Fermi-surface topology. These results reconcile apparently competing theoretical scenarios and provide a comprehensive understanding, highlighting the distinctive role of orbital hybridization in multilayer correlated superconductors.

AI.tldr: 该研究使用变分蒙特卡洛方法分析双层镍酸盐La3Ni2O7的超导机制，揭示了配对起源与超导关联分布之间的层次结构，解释了s±能隙对称性的微观起源。
AI.motivation: 高压下双层镍酸盐La3Ni2O7的超导转变温度接近80K，引发了对其微观起源的激烈争论。虽然s±能隙对称性被广泛提出，但负责配对的电子自由度仍未确定，需要澄清配对相互作用的来源和轨道作用机制。
AI.method: 采用变分蒙特卡洛方法研究双层两轨道Hubbard模型，分析Ni 3dz²轨道的键合-反键合分裂以及轨道杂化对超导关联的重新分布作用。
AI.result: 研究发现配对相互作用主要来源于Ni 3dz²轨道的键合-反键合分裂，而轨道杂化将超导关联重新分布到dx²-y²通道，尽管其本征配对相互作用较弱。这解释了为什么两个轨道通道表现出可比较的长程关联，且得到的s±态对费米面拓扑变化具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究调和了表面上相互竞争的理论方案，提供了对多层关联超导体中轨道杂化独特作用的全面理解，阐明了配对起源与超导关联分布之间的区别。

title: Manufacturable blazed metasurface gratings designed by 3D topology optimization model
comment: 15 pages including 8 figures, 1-page appendix including 2 figures
summary: We present the generalization of our FEM-based topology optimization framework to 3D blazed metasurfaces operating in reflection over the visible and near-infrared range [400-1,500]nm. The design region is described through a density-based SIMP interpolation and optimized using the adjoint method, enabling the treatment of several tens of thousands degrees of freedom. A first approach directly applies topology optimization to the 3D Finite Element mesh (mesh-based), yielding a freeform structure that achieves an average diffraction efficiency of 62% in order -1 over two octaves under the targeted incidence. However, such patterns remain difficult to manufacture. We therefore introduce a pillar-based parameterization, embedding fabrication constraints within the optimization loop. The resulting binary metasurface, compatible with e-beam lithography and Reactive Ion Etching techniques, achieves an average efficiency of 57% over the same spectral band in s-polarization, with low polarization dependence. This work demonstrates that large-scale 3D topology optimization can bridge the gap between broadband optical performance and realistic nanofabrication constraints for blazed metasurfaces.

AI.tldr: 该论文将FEM拓扑优化框架扩展到3D闪耀超表面设计，通过两种方法实现宽带高效反射：自由形式结构（62%效率）和可制造的柱状结构（57%效率），平衡了光学性能与制造约束。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是解决3D闪耀超表面在可见光和近红外波段（400-1500nm）宽带高效反射的设计挑战，同时需要满足实际纳米制造约束，弥合光学性能与制造可行性之间的差距。
AI.method: 采用基于密度的SIMP插值法和伴随方法进行拓扑优化，处理数万个自由度。提出两种方法：1）直接在3D有限元网格上优化（自由形式）；2）引入柱状参数化方法，将制造约束嵌入优化循环，生成与电子束光刻和反应离子刻蚀兼容的二元超表面。
AI.result: 自由形式结构在-1级衍射中实现62%的平均效率（两个倍频程），但难以制造。柱状参数化方法产生的二元超表面在相同光谱范围内实现57%的平均效率（s偏振），具有低偏振依赖性，且可制造。
AI.conclusion: 大规模3D拓扑优化能够有效弥合闪耀超表面的宽带光学性能与实际纳米制造约束之间的差距，为高性能可制造超表面设计提供了可行框架。

title: Speed fluctuations of a stochastic Huxley-Zel'dovich front
summary: The empirical speed of travelling reaction-diffusion fronts fluctuates due to the intrinsic shot noise of the reactions and diffusion. Here we study the long-time front speed fluctuations of a stochastic Huxley-Zel'dovich front. It involves a population of particles $A$ which perform a fast continuous-time random walk on a one-dimensional lattice and undergo reversible on-site reactions $2A \rightleftarrows 3A$. This front describes an invasion of $A$-particles into an initially empty region of space which, in a deterministic description, is marginally stable but nonlinearly unstable with a zero instability threshold. Typical fluctuations of this front can be described as front diffusion in a reference frame moving with the average front speed. According to the existing perturbation theory, the shot-noise-induced systematic shift of the average front speed, $δc$, and the front diffusion coefficient, $D_f$, are both expected to scale with $N$ as $1/N$, where $N \gg 1$ is the typical number of particles in the transition region. Furthermore, $D_f$ can be determined perturbatively in the small parameter $1/\sqrt{N}$. Our Monte Carlo simulations support these asymptotic results, but also reveal a long-lived anomalous behavior of the first few particles before they reach the expected diffusion asymptotic. We also study large deviations of the empirical speed of the front at long times. These are dominated by optimal histories of the system in the form of a propagating front which travels with a speed different from the average speed, or even travel in the wrong direction.

AI.tldr: 研究随机Huxley-Zel'dovich反应扩散前沿的长时速度涨落，包括典型涨落（前沿扩散）和大偏差，发现前沿速度偏移和扩散系数均按1/N标度，但存在长寿命异常行为。
AI.motivation: 研究反应扩散前沿的固有散粒噪声引起的速度涨落，特别是对于具有零失稳阈值的边际稳定但非线性不稳定系统，理解其长时统计特性。
AI.method: 采用随机Huxley-Zel'dovich模型，粒子在1D晶格上快速连续时间随机行走，发生可逆反应2A⇌3A。结合微扰理论（小参数1/√N）和蒙特卡洛模拟分析前沿速度涨落。
AI.result: 前沿速度偏移δc和扩散系数D_f均按1/N标度，与微扰理论一致。蒙特卡洛模拟支持渐近结果，但发现前几个粒子存在长寿命异常扩散行为。大偏差由以不同速度传播的最优历史主导。
AI.conclusion: 随机Huxley-Zel'dovich前沿的典型涨落可用前沿扩散描述，速度偏移和扩散系数按预期标度，但存在异常瞬态行为。大偏差分析揭示了系统以非平均速度传播的最优历史。

title: Diffusion-based Generative Machine Learning Model for Predicting Crack Propagation in Aluminum Nitride at the Atomic Scale
summary: Predicting atomic-scale crack propagation in aluminum nitride (AlN) is critical for semiconductor reliability but remains prohibitively expensive via molecular dynamics (MD). We develop a diffusion-based generative machine learning model to predict atomic-scale crack propagation in AlN, a critical semiconductor material, by conditioning solely on initial microstructure embeddings. Trained on MD simulations of single-crack systems, the model achieves a significant speedup while accurately forecasting dynamic fracture processes, including stress-driven crack initiation, crack branching, and atomic-scale bridging ligaments. Crucially, it demonstrates inherent physical fidelity by reproducing material-intrinsic mechanisms while disregarding periodic boundary artifacts, and generalizes to unseen multi-crack configurations. Validation against MD ground truth confirms the capability of the model to capture complex fracture physics without auxiliary stress or energy data, enabling rapid exploration of crack-mediated failure for semiconductor reliability optimization.

AI.tldr: 开发基于扩散的生成机器学习模型，仅通过初始微结构嵌入预测氮化铝原子尺度裂纹扩展，相比分子动力学大幅加速，能准确预测动态断裂过程。
AI.motivation: 分子动力学模拟原子尺度裂纹扩展计算成本过高，阻碍半导体可靠性研究。需要开发高效准确的替代方法预测氮化铝等关键半导体材料的裂纹扩展行为。
AI.method: 基于扩散的生成机器学习模型，仅以初始微结构嵌入为条件进行训练。使用单裂纹系统的分子动力学模拟数据进行训练，模型能够预测动态断裂过程。
AI.result: 模型实现显著加速，准确预测应力驱动裂纹萌生、裂纹分支和原子尺度桥接韧带等动态断裂过程。验证显示模型能捕捉复杂断裂物理，无需辅助应力或能量数据，并能泛化到未见的多裂纹配置。
AI.conclusion: 该扩散生成模型为半导体可靠性优化提供了快速探索裂纹介导失效的有效工具，具有固有的物理保真度，能再现材料固有机制并忽略周期性边界伪影。

title: Spin qubit gates via phonon buses in electron nanowires
summary: Scalable architectures for quantum computing using semiconductor quantum dots require interactions between qubits beyond adjacent quantum dots. Here, we propose using nanowires of electrons to mediate the interaction between two quantum dots. Virtual phonons in the linear chain of electrons can mediate an interaction that gives rise to effective spin-spin coupling of the electrons in distant quantum dots. We find coupling strengths of more than 30 MHz for experimentally realisable parameters in GaAs quantum dots.

AI.tldr: 提出使用电子纳米线作为媒介，实现半导体量子点中非相邻量子比特之间的有效自旋-自旋耦合
AI.motivation: 半导体量子点量子计算需要超越相邻量子点的量子比特相互作用，现有架构在可扩展性方面存在限制
AI.method: 使用电子纳米线作为媒介，通过电子线性链中的虚拟声子介导两个量子点之间的相互作用，产生有效的自旋-自旋耦合
AI.result: 在GaAs量子点的实验可实现参数下，获得了超过30 MHz的耦合强度
AI.conclusion: 电子纳米线介导的相互作用为实现可扩展的半导体量子点量子计算架构提供了一种有前景的方法

title: A Primary Unified Geometric Framework of Molecular Reaction Dynamics Based on the Variational Principle
summary: This work describes a geometric framework on molecular reaction dynamics based on the variational principle, where the Schr{ö}dinger equation must be solved to ``see'' how a reaction occurs. First, the mathematical preliminaries are given by discussing the principle of least action and the mountain pass theorem. Second, we discuss the physical preliminaries, including the principle of equivalence for deriving the kinetic energy operator (KEO) and artificial intelligence (AI) techniques to build the potential energy surface (PES) in general spacetime. Moreover, we simplified electromagnetic interactions in curved spacetime within the molecular system and consequently, we are able to construct the nuclear Hamiltonian in nonzero curvature spacetime. This indicates possibility to introduce gauge fields through the curvature, such as additional term in the nuclear KEO near a conical intersection. Third, the single-particle approximation provides a powful ansatz to solve the Schr{ö}dinger equation by variational principle. Thus, one can formulate the variational approaches for either electronic structure or quantum dynamics. In this work, based on previous discussions ({\it Phys. Chem. Chem. Phys.} {\bf 27} (2025), 20397) we unified them by a geometric description, where the geometric phase is naturally introduced. Finally, due to optimization characteristic of the present theory, further discussions on the present theory from optimization insight are also given, including two postulates, generative AI techniques, role of perturbation, and Markov process in optimization.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于变分原理的分子反应动力学几何框架，将量子力学、几何相和优化理论统一起来，用于描述分子系统中的反应过程。
AI.motivation: 传统方法需要求解薛定谔方程才能"看到"反应如何发生，作者希望建立一个统一的几何框架，通过变分原理和几何描述来理解分子反应动力学，特别是引入几何相和曲率效应。
AI.method: 1. 建立数学基础：最小作用量原理和山路定理；2. 建立物理基础：等效原理推导动能算符，AI技术构建势能面，简化弯曲时空中的电磁相互作用；3. 单粒子近似作为变分求解薛定谔方程的有力ansatz；4. 统一电子结构和量子动力学的变分方法，引入几何描述和几何相。
AI.result: 构建了非零曲率时空中的核哈密顿量，表明可以通过曲率引入规范场（如锥形交叉附近的核动能算符附加项），建立了统一的几何框架，自然引入了几何相。
AI.conclusion: 该理论具有优化特性，从优化角度进一步讨论了两个假设、生成式AI技术、扰动作用和优化中的马尔可夫过程，为分子反应动力学提供了一个统一的几何-变分框架。

title: Effective band-projected description of interacting quasiperiodic systems
summary: We study the interplay between electronic interactions and quasiperiodicity in a one-dimensional narrow-band system, focusing on ground-state and low-energy excitation properties. Using band projection as low-energy effective approach, we show that a projection restricted to first order in the interaction strength fails to reproduce the correlated phase diagram. This contrasts with the standard success of first-order band projection in translationally invariant flatband systems and highlights the essential role of virtual processes involving remote bands in quasiperiodic settings. By incorporating second-order interband contributions perturbatively, we obtain an effective Hamiltonian that quantitatively reproduces the exact phase iagram previously obtained using density matrix renormalization group calculations, including the transition between a Luttinger liquid and a charge-density-wave phase and the crossover to a quasifractal charge-density-wave regime at strong quasiperiodicity. We further use this controlled framework to investigate low-energy neutral excitations and the optical conductivity, identifying clear dynamical signatures distinguishing the different phases. Our results establish second-order band projection as a reliable tool for correlated quasiperiodic narrow-band systems and suggest a promising route for studying interacting quasiperiodic and moiré materials beyond one dimension.

AI.tldr: 研究一维准周期窄带系统中电子相互作用与准周期性的相互作用，发现一阶能带投影不足以描述相关相图，需要二阶能带投影才能准确再现相变行为。
AI.motivation: 研究准周期系统中电子相互作用与准周期性之间的相互作用，特别是在窄带系统中，传统的一阶能带投影方法在平移不变平带系统中有效，但在准周期系统中可能失效。
AI.method: 使用能带投影作为低能有效方法，首先尝试一阶投影，发现不足后引入二阶带间贡献的微扰处理，构建有效哈密顿量，并与密度矩阵重整化群计算结果对比验证。
AI.result: 一阶投影无法再现相关相图，而二阶投影能定量重现Luttinger液体与电荷密度波相之间的转变，以及在强准周期性下的准分形电荷密度波交叉行为，并能区分不同相的低能中性激发和光学电导率特征。
AI.conclusion: 二阶能带投影是研究相关准周期窄带系统的可靠工具，为研究超越一维的相互作用准周期和莫尔材料提供了有前景的途径。

title: Superhydrides on the way to ambient pressure: weak localization and persistent X-ray photoconductivity in BaSiH$_{8}$
summary: Reducing the stabilization pressure of superhydrides represents one of the most important challenges in hydrogen-saturated compound chemistry. Moving in this direction, we studied the Ba-Si-H system at 0-142 GPa using transport measurements, 1H nuclear magnetic resonance, single-crystal and powder X-ray diffraction in the temperature range of 4-317 K. We synthesized the previously predicted cubic BaSiH$_{8}$ at pressures of 18-31 GPa. Remarkably, we demonstrate that BaSiH$_8$ remains stable upon decompression to ambient conditions and can be recovered from the diamond anvil cell. Obtained Ba-Si polyhydrides exhibit metallic and superconducting properties ($\textit{T$_c$}$ = 9 K, $\textit{B$_{c2}$}$(0)=13-16 T) at 142 GPa. However, at pressures below 50 GPa, these hydrides behave as degenerate semiconductors (bandgap < 0.4 meV) or poor metals with weak electron localization, negative magnetoresistance, photovoltaic effect, and persistent photoconductivity in the X-ray and visible range. Our work demonstrates the high-pressure synthesis of Ba-Si polyhydrides that remain stable upon decompression to ambient conditions, overcoming a critical bottleneck in superhydride chemistry and establishing a foundation for practical applications in hydrogen storage.

AI.tldr: 在Ba-Si-H体系中成功合成并稳定了立方BaSiH₈，该材料在18-31 GPa压力下合成后可在常压下保持稳定，具有从超导到半导体/弱金属的多种电子特性。
AI.motivation: 降低超氢化物的稳定压力是氢饱和化合物化学中最关键的挑战之一，本研究旨在探索Ba-Si-H体系在不同压力下的稳定性与性质。
AI.method: 在0-142 GPa压力范围和4-317 K温度范围内，采用输运测量、1H核磁共振、单晶和粉末X射线衍射等方法研究Ba-Si-H体系。
AI.result: 在18-31 GPa压力下合成了先前预测的立方BaSiH₈，该材料可在常压下稳定回收；在142 GPa时表现出金属性和超导性（Tc=9 K，Bc2(0)=13-16 T）；在低于50 GPa时表现为简并半导体或弱金属，具有弱电子局域化、负磁阻、光伏效应和持续光电导等特性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究实现了可在常压下稳定的Ba-Si多氢化物的高压合成，突破了超氢化物化学的关键瓶颈，为氢储存的实际应用奠定了基础。

title: Introduction to the artificial neural network-based variational Monte Carlo method
summary: In this self-contained tutorial, the variational Monte Carlo method with trial wave functions based on artificial neural networks is detailed. Unfolding the historical background we illustrate how machine learning interacts with physics research. The mathematical tools for both, artificial neural networks and variational Monte Carlo, are introduced. We demonstrate, how the algorithm operates with generic examples from chemical physics, including the harmonic, the Morse, the Poschl-Teller and the Yukawa potential, as well as the simplest molecules, the hydrogen molecular ion and the hydrogen molecule.

AI.tldr: 这是一篇关于使用基于人工神经网络的变分波函数进行变分蒙特卡洛方法的教程论文，涵盖了历史背景、数学工具介绍，并在化学物理的多个示例中演示了该方法的应用。
AI.motivation: 该论文旨在详细阐述基于人工神经网络的变分波函数的变分蒙特卡洛方法，展示机器学习如何与物理研究相互作用，为研究人员提供完整的教程。
AI.method: 论文介绍了人工神经网络和变分蒙特卡洛的数学工具，使用基于神经网络的变分波函数作为尝试波函数，通过变分蒙特卡洛方法求解量子系统。
AI.result: 该方法在多个化学物理系统中得到演示，包括谐振子势、莫尔斯势、Poschl-Teller势、汤川势，以及最简单的分子系统：氢分子离子和氢分子。
AI.conclusion: 论文提供了一个完整的教程，展示了基于神经网络的变分蒙特卡洛方法在量子化学物理问题中的应用潜力，为机器学习与物理研究的交叉领域提供了实用指南。

title: Energy Dynamics and Partial Consumption in Foraging
summary: In this work, we consider partial consumption of food by a forager in presence of a threshold energy level. The forager considered here can survive for $S$ steps without food, namely the survival time. The threshold limits the consumption of food in such a way that, the forager will only consume food, whenever its energy is below the threshold $k$. Due to partial consumption of food, a site containing food may not always be fully depleted, which in turn helps in increasing the lifetime of the forager. It has been observed that, in our case, the lifetime always increases with $k/S$, although there is a transition threshold $k^*$ below which the increase of lifetime is rapid and above is low. The transition threshold $k^* \sim \sqrt{S}$. The lifetime $τ$ shows a power law behavior as $τ\sim S^β$. For $k/S=0$, the value of $β$ is $4/3$, it then jumps above $2$ and decreases gradually to $1.84$ with increasing $k/S$. Other important quantities like number of revisits to a site, food statistics etc. have been studied and these also show some interesting scaling behavior. The collection of sites either fully or partially depleted of food after the death of the forager $N_{eat}$ shows a crossover behaviour for $k/S \sim 0.5$.

AI.tldr: 研究部分食物消耗对觅食者寿命的影响，考虑能量阈值和生存时间约束，发现寿命随k/S增加，存在临界阈值k*~√S，寿命τ呈现幂律行为τ~S^β，β值在0到1.84之间变化。
AI.motivation: 研究在能量阈值限制下，觅食者部分消耗食物的行为如何影响其生存时间。传统模型通常假设完全消耗食物，但实际中觅食者可能只消耗部分食物，这会影响食物资源的可持续性和觅食者的寿命。
AI.method: 建立数学模型，考虑觅食者在生存时间S内需要食物维持，设定能量阈值k限制食物消耗（只有当能量低于k时才进食）。研究部分食物消耗对寿命的影响，分析临界阈值、幂律标度行为和食物统计特性。
AI.result: 1. 寿命τ随k/S增加而增加，但存在临界阈值k*~√S，低于该阈值时寿命增长迅速，高于时增长缓慢。2. 寿命呈现幂律行为τ~S^β，当k/S=0时β=4/3，随着k/S增加，β值跃升至2以上后逐渐降至1.84。3. 被消耗食物站点数N_eat在k/S~0.5时出现交叉行为。4. 站点重访次数和食物统计也显示有趣的标度行为。
AI.conclusion: 部分食物消耗策略能显著提高觅食者的寿命，能量阈值k与生存时间S的比值是关键参数。存在临界阈值k*~√S区分不同的寿命增长模式，幂律标度行为揭示了系统的基本物理特性。这种部分消耗策略可能反映了自然界中资源管理的优化机制。

title: Accurate electronic and optical properties of bulk antiferromagnet CrSBr via a tuned hybrid density functional with on-site corrections
summary: CrSBr, a layered antiferromagnet, is emerging as a versatile platform for exploring strong coupling between optical and magnetic properties in low dimensions. While experimental research on this material has progressed at a rapid pace, reliable results on the ab initio front are limited to the domain of self-consistent, many-body perturbation theory, which is both computationally expensive and technically challenging. We present an alternate, less-demanding approach -- rooted in generalized Kohn-Sham density functional theory -- that can deliver accurate electronic structure and optical absorption spectra of CrSBr, as well as quantitively accurate predictions of coupling of excitons to magnetic order in CrSBr. Using a minimal two-parameter set that can be tuned to reproduce a couple of well-known experimental and/or theoretical benchmarks, such as fundamental and optical gaps, we demonstrate excellent predictive capability for the tuned functional. The approach presented here can potentially be applied broadly to other magnetic semiconductors, complementing and simplifying current approaches to modeling these materials.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于广义Kohn-Sham密度泛函理论的替代方法，用于准确预测CrSBr的电子结构、光学吸收谱以及激子与磁序的耦合，相比传统多体微扰理论计算成本更低。
AI.motivation: CrSBr作为层状反铁磁体，是研究低维光学与磁性质强耦合的重要平台。然而，目前可靠的从头算方法主要依赖于自洽多体微扰理论，这种方法计算成本高且技术挑战大，需要开发更简单有效的替代方案。
AI.method: 采用基于广义Kohn-Sham密度泛函理论的替代方法，使用仅需两个参数的最小参数集，通过调整这些参数来重现已知的实验和理论基准（如基本带隙和光学带隙），从而获得准确的预测能力。
AI.result: 该方法能够准确预测CrSBr的电子结构和光学吸收谱，并定量预测激子与磁序的耦合。经过调谐的泛函展现出优秀的预测能力，验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 这种基于广义Kohn-Sham密度泛函理论的方法计算成本较低且技术简单，可以广泛应用于其他磁性半导体材料，补充和简化当前对这些材料的建模方法。

title: Ultrafast photo-thermoelectric currents in graphene junctions in the mid-infrared
summary: Graphene is widely recognized for its ultrafast and broadband photocurrent response, but whether the broadband ultrafast characteristics are preserved at mid-infrared wavelengths with photon energies below the optical phonon energy remains an open question. Here, we investigate the carrier dynamics in graphene junctions under mid-infrared excitation using an ultrafast pump-probe photocurrent spectroscopy. We utilize dual split gate devices to demonstrate that the photo-thermoelectric effect can dominate the photoresponse of graphene also for a mid-infrared femtosecond excitation. We observe that graphene retains its broadband photocurrent response in this spectral region, but the photocurrent relaxation time increases from ca. 2 ps below 8-9 micrometer up to 3 ps at longer mid-infrared wavelengths. The absence of a pronounced phonon bottleneck in the decay dynamics at room temperature suggests an efficient interplay of electron-electron and electron-phonon scattering even for photon energies below the optical phonon energy in graphene. The observed wavelength dependence of the photocurrent relaxation times is consistent with energy-dependent theoretical relaxation times as derived from a microscopic transport theory of graphene that includes electron-phonon coupling within a Holstein-Peierls Hamiltonian.

AI.tldr: 石墨烯在中红外波段仍保持宽带光电流响应，但弛豫时间随波长增加而延长，未出现明显的声子瓶颈效应。
AI.motivation: 研究石墨烯在中红外波段（光子能量低于光学声子能量）是否仍能保持其超快宽带光电流特性，这是当前未解决的问题。
AI.method: 使用超快泵浦-探测光电流光谱技术研究石墨烯结中的载流子动力学，采用双分裂栅器件证明光热电效应在中红外飞秒激发下的主导作用。
AI.result: 石墨烯在中红外波段仍保持宽带光电流响应，但光电流弛豫时间从8-9微米以下的约2ps增加到更长波长的3ps。室温下未观察到明显的声子瓶颈效应，表明电子-电子和电子-声子散射之间存在高效相互作用。
AI.conclusion: 石墨烯在中红外波段仍保持其宽带特性，弛豫时间的波长依赖性与基于Holstein-Peierls哈密顿量的微观输运理论预测一致，表明即使光子能量低于光学声子能量，电子-声子和电子-电子散射仍能有效耦合。

title: First-principles modeling of electrostatics and transport in 2D topological transistors
summary: We develop a simulation framework for electrostatic and transport modeling of 2D Topological insulator field-effect transistor (2D TIFETs), based solely on first-principles calculations using density functional theory (DFT). We find that careful consideration of basis set and symmetry constraints in DFT calculations is crucial for determining critical electric field ($E_c$), defined as the electric field intensity at which the topological phase transition occurs. Using ballistic Landauer-B$ü$ttiker formula and local potential profile, the drain current-gate bias voltage ($I_D$-$V_G$) characteristics were obtained and switching behavior was studied. A comparison with the $\mathbf{k}\cdot\mathbf{p}$ model reveals the necessity of DFT calculations for investigating realistic edge dispersions. Our approach provides an efficient and rigorous simulation methodology for mesoscopic transport in 2D TIFETs.

AI.tldr: 开发基于第一性原理DFT计算的二维拓扑绝缘体场效应晶体管静电与输运模拟框架，揭示DFT计算对确定拓扑相变临界电场的重要性，并与k·p模型对比验证DFT的必要性。
AI.motivation: 为二维拓扑绝缘体场效应晶体管（2D TIFETs）开发一种高效且严谨的模拟方法，基于第一性原理计算来研究其静电和输运特性，避免传统简化模型的局限性。
AI.method: 基于密度泛函理论（DFT）进行第一性原理计算，考虑基组和对称性约束确定临界电场；采用弹道Landauer-Büttiker公式和局域电势分布计算漏极电流-栅极电压特性；与k·p模型进行对比分析。
AI.result: DFT计算中基组和对称性约束对确定拓扑相变临界电场至关重要；通过DFT获得的漏极电流-栅极电压特性揭示了开关行为；与k·p模型对比表明DFT计算对于研究实际边缘色散是必要的。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为二维拓扑绝缘体场效应晶体管的介观输运模拟提供了一种高效且严谨的第一性原理计算方法，强调了DFT在准确描述拓扑相变和边缘态方面的重要性。

title: Systematically Improvable Numerical Atomic Orbital Basis Using Contracted Truncated Spherical Waves
summary: To solve the Kohn-Sham equation within the framework of density functional theory, we develop a scheme to construct numerical atomic orbital (NAO) basis sets by contracting truncated spherical waves (TSWs). The contraction minimizes the trace of the kinetic operator in the residual space, generalizing the spillage minimizing scheme [M. Chen et al., J. Phys. Condens. Matter 22, 445501 (2010); P. Lin et al., Phys. Rev. B 103, 235131 (2021)]. In addition to the systematic improvability inherited from previous schemes, the use of TSW instead of plane waves as the expansion basis bridges reference states and NAOs more effectively, and eliminates spurious interactions between periodic images, thereby enabling better transferability through the inclusion of extensive reference states. Benchmarks demonstrate that the constructed NAO achieves satisfactory precision for various properties of both molecules and bulk systems, including total energy, bond length, atomization energy, lattice constant, cohesive energy, band gap, and energy-level alignment. By incorporating unoccupied states, the improved transferability in describing the conduction band is demonstrated to be effective and substantial.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种通过截断球面波收缩构建数值原子轨道基组的新方法，用于密度泛函理论中的Kohn-Sham方程求解。
AI.motivation: 为了在密度泛函理论框架下求解Kohn-Sham方程，需要开发能够有效构建数值原子轨道基组的方法。传统方法存在局限性，需要改进基组的系统可改进性、转移性和计算精度。
AI.method: 使用截断球面波作为展开基组，通过最小化残余空间中动能算符的迹来收缩构建数值原子轨道基组，这是对先前溢出最小化方案的推广。
AI.result: 构建的数值原子轨道基组在分子和体相系统的多种性质上达到满意精度，包括总能、键长、原子化能、晶格常数、内聚能、带隙和能级对齐。通过包含未占据态，在描述导带方面显示出有效且显著的改进转移性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法不仅继承了先前方案的系统可改进性，而且通过使用截断球面波而非平面波作为展开基组，更有效地桥接参考态和数值原子轨道，消除了周期性图像间的虚假相互作用，从而通过包含广泛的参考态实现了更好的转移性。

title: Superradiant strongly correlated quantum states in cavity Hubbard model
summary: In cavity quantum materials, entangling strongly correlated electrons with quantum light provides a unique opportunity to explore novel quantum phases and phase transitions absent in conventional solid-state materials. In this study, we develop a sign-problem-free fermion-photon hybrid Quantum Monte Carlo (QMC) algorithm, and use it to systematically investigate the ground-state phase diagram of a two-dimensional cavity Hubbard model. It is shown that the interplay between the electron correlation and photon condensation gives rise to intriguing quantum phases ({\it e.g.} superradiant antiferromagnetic and chiral/$π$-flux states), and different quantum phase transitions, such as a first-order superradiant phase transition and a continuous phase transition with Gross-Neveu universality class. The methodology can be readily generalized to more complicated cavity strongly correlated models.

AI.tldr: 开发了无符号问题的费米子-光子混合量子蒙特卡洛算法，用于研究二维腔Hubbard模型的基态相图，发现了超辐射反铁磁和手性/π-通量态等新奇量子相，以及一级超辐射相变和Gross-Neveu普适类的连续相变。
AI.motivation: 腔量子材料中强关联电子与量子光的纠缠为探索传统固态材料中不存在的新奇量子相和相变提供了独特机会，但需要有效的数值方法来研究这类复杂系统的基态性质。
AI.method: 开发了无符号问题的费米子-光子混合量子蒙特卡洛算法，能够有效处理电子关联和光子凝聚的相互作用，并系统地研究了二维腔Hubbard模型的基态相图。
AI.result: 发现电子关联与光子凝聚的相互作用产生了超辐射反铁磁态和手性/π-通量态等新奇量子相，观察到一级超辐射相变和属于Gross-Neveu普适类的连续相变。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可推广到更复杂的腔强关联模型，为研究腔量子材料中的新奇量子现象提供了有效的数值工具，揭示了电子-光子耦合系统中的丰富物理。

title: The stripe state at 1/8 Ba doping hosts optimal superconductivity in La-214 cuprates under low in-plane stress
summary: The cuprate system La$_{2-x}$Ba$_{x}$CuO$_{4}$ (LBCO) exhibits a pronounced sensitivity to in-plane uniaxial stress, particularly near the 1/8 doping anomaly, where stripe order strongly suppresses bulk superconductivity. While previous studies have focused on compositions close to 0.125, the commensurate $x$=0.125 phase remains largely unexplored under symmetry-selective lattice tuning. Here, we combine muon-spin rotation ($μ$SR), AC susceptibility, and electrical resistivity to investigate superconductivity, spin-stripe order, and structural response in LBCO-0.125 under in-plane uniaxial stress applied 45$^\circ$ to the Cu-O bond direction. Complementary resistivity measurements on $x$=0.115 and 0.135 track the evolution across both sides of the anomaly. We observe a giant enhancement of the bulk superconducting transition temperature in LBCO-0.125, increasing from 5 K to 37 K under 0.5 GPa. While the onset temperature of spin-stripe order decreases only modestly, the magnetic volume fraction is reduced by about a factor of two, with local order preserved. Simultaneously, the resistivity peak associated with the LTT phase is fully suppressed across all dopings. These results demonstrate that suppression of the LTT phase and reduction of the static spin-stripe-ordered volume fraction are crucial for the development of optimal three-dimensional superconductivity. Strikingly, the composition $x$=0.125, with the most robust stripe stability and the lowest ambient-pressure $T_{\rm c}$ develops the highest $T_{\rm c}$ under stress, reaching a zero-resistance state at 37 K and an onset of the superconducting transition as high as 46 K. This behavior indicates that stripe-related interactions enhance pairing strength, while static stripe order competes with superconductivity primarily at the level of phase coherence rather than pairing itself.

AI.tldr: LBCO-0.125在面内单轴应力下表现出超导转变温度的巨幅提升（从5K到37K），同时自旋条纹序的体积分数减少但局部序保留，LTT相被完全抑制，表明条纹相关相互作用增强配对强度，而静态条纹序主要在相位相干层面与超导竞争。
AI.motivation: 研究LBCO体系在1/8掺杂异常附近的应力敏感性，特别是x=0.125这一未充分探索的组分在对称选择性晶格调控下的行为，理解条纹序与超导性的竞争关系。
AI.method: 结合μ子自旋旋转(μSR)、交流磁化率、电阻率测量，研究LBCO-0.125在45°方向施加面内单轴应力下的超导性、自旋条纹序和结构响应；补充测量x=0.115和0.135的电阻率以追踪异常两侧的演化。
AI.result: LBCO-0.125在0.5GPa应力下，体超导转变温度从5K大幅提升至37K；自旋条纹序的起始温度仅略有下降，但磁体积分数减少约一半，局部序保留；与LTT相相关的电阻率峰在所有掺杂下被完全抑制。
AI.conclusion: 抑制LTT相和减少静态自旋条纹序体积分数对发展最优三维超导性至关重要；条纹相关相互作用增强配对强度，而静态条纹序主要在相位相干层面与超导竞争，而非配对本身。

title: On thermalization in many-body classical Floquet systems
summary: It is expected that a generic closed many-body system prepared in a well-behaved initial state and subjected to a periodic drive will eventually thermalize, i.e. approach the state of maximal entropy. This property, while compatible with and even demanded by the physical intuition, is much stronger than ergodicity or mixing and is difficult to justify mathematically. We describe an infinite set of classical many-body Floquet systems of algebraic origin for which thermalization of very general initial states can be proved. For example, we show that a Gibbs state of any sufficiently uniform local differentiable Hamiltonian heats up to infinite temperature at long times. We show that in agreement with the physical intuition, the only obstruction to thermalization is the existence of local observables which are periodic in time.

AI.tldr: 证明了无限多经典多体Floquet系统会热化到无限温度，热化的唯一障碍是存在时间周期性的局域可观测量
AI.motivation: 虽然物理直觉认为周期性驱动的封闭多体系统最终会热化到最大熵态，但这比遍历性或混合性更强，难以数学证明。本文旨在为一大类系统提供严格的热化证明。
AI.method: 构造了无限多代数起源的经典多体Floquet系统，证明非常一般的初始态都会热化。特别证明了任何足够均匀的局域可微哈密顿量的Gibbs态在长时间下会加热到无限温度。
AI.result: 证明了这些系统确实会热化到无限温度，且热化的唯一障碍是存在时间周期性的局域可观测量，这与物理直觉一致。
AI.conclusion: 为一大类周期性驱动的经典多体系统提供了严格的热化数学证明，确认了物理直觉：只要不存在时间周期性的局域可观测量，系统就会热化到最大熵态。

title: Smoothed Boundary Method Framework for Electrochemical Simulation of Li-ion Battery Cathode with Complex Microstructure: Model, Formulation and Parameterization
summary: Rechargeable battery electrodes have highly complex microstructures, consisting of nonuniform electrode particles, tortuous electrolyte channels, and irregular particle-electrolyte interfaces. Moreover, the electrochemical processes involve several coupled physical mechanisms, including mass transport in the electrode particles and electrolyte, current continuity in the solid and liquid, and electrochemical surface reactions. These geometric and mechanistic complexities create a challenging barrier of electrochemical simulations at the microstructural level using conventional methods. In this paper, we introduce a smoothed-boundary method (SBM) electrochemical simulation framework for modeling the electrochemical dynamics of complex battery electrode microstructures. The conventional governing equations are reformulated into SBM versions, and are solved using uniform Cartesian grids. The simulations utilize an image-based, experimentally reconstructed 3D microstructure as the input geometry, and the physical parameters acquired from experimental measurements. Two models of lithiation mechanisms, solid-solution and two-phase, are examined under potentiostatic discharging of a Li$_x$CoO$_2$ composite cathode. Detailed dynamics of the complex cathode microstructure are revealed through the simulations. The comparison between the two models indicates that modeling two-phase lithiation with Fick's diffusion will overestimate the electrode's performance. The presented simulation framework provides an innovative avenue in exploring the electrochemical dynamics at the microstructural level.

AI.tldr: 提出一种平滑边界方法(SBM)电化学模拟框架，用于在复杂电池电极微结构上进行电化学动力学建模，使用实验重建的3D微结构作为输入几何，比较了固溶和两相锂化机制。
AI.motivation: 可充电电池电极具有高度复杂的微结构，包括不均匀的电极颗粒、曲折的电解质通道和不规则的颗粒-电解质界面。电化学过程涉及多种耦合物理机制，包括电极颗粒和电解质中的质量传输、固液中的电流连续性以及电化学表面反应。这些几何和机制复杂性给传统方法的微结构级电化学模拟带来了挑战。
AI.method: 引入平滑边界方法(SBM)电化学模拟框架，将传统控制方程重新表述为SBM版本，使用均匀笛卡尔网格求解。模拟利用基于图像的实验重建3D微结构作为输入几何，并使用实验测量的物理参数。在Li$_x$CoO$_2$复合阴极恒电位放电条件下，研究了固溶和两相两种锂化机制模型。
AI.result: 通过模拟揭示了复杂阴极微结构的详细动力学。两种模型的比较表明，使用菲克扩散建模两相锂化会高估电极性能。模拟框架提供了探索微结构级电化学动力学的创新途径。
AI.conclusion: 提出的SBM电化学模拟框架为在复杂电池电极微结构水平上探索电化学动力学提供了创新方法，能够处理传统方法难以解决的几何和机制复杂性，为电池性能优化和设计提供了重要工具。

title: Eccentricity valley Hall effect
summary: Valleytronics harnesses the valley degree of freedom -- energy-degenerate extrema in the electronic band structure -- for information storage and processing. Valley Hall effect (VHE) is a cornerstone of valleytronics, enabling electric generation of pure valley currents. While extensively studied in systems with valleys located at time-reversal-breaking points, here, we shift the paradigm to valleytronic platforms with time-reversal-invariant valleys (TRIVs), revealing a novel phenomenon: eccentricity VHE. Unlike conventional VHE, the valley Hall angle for eccentricity VHE is an intrinsic geometric property, governed solely by the eccentricity of the valley Fermi surface, rendering it highly robust against variations in temperature or carrier density. Eccentricity VHE emerges universally across all 25 layer groups supporting TRIVs. We demonstrate these distinctive features in monolayer GeS$_{2}$ via first-principles calculations, predicting a significant valley Hall angle of 0.74. This effect can be detected through nonlocal transport measurements exhibiting characteristic scaling behavior, or, in certain cases, through valley-layer coupling. Our findings reveal a critical overlooked facet of valley Hall physics, transcend the established VHE paradigm, and significantly broadens the scope of valleytronics.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种新型谷霍尔效应——偏心谷霍尔效应，该效应存在于时间反演对称谷系统中，其谷霍尔角由谷费米面的偏心度决定，具有内在几何性质，对温度和载流子密度变化高度鲁棒。
AI.motivation: 传统谷霍尔效应主要研究时间反演对称破缺系统中的谷自由度，但忽略了时间反演对称谷系统。本研究旨在探索这类系统中的新型谷霍尔效应，以扩展谷电子学的物理基础和应用范围。
AI.method: 理论分析25个支持时间反演对称谷的层群，揭示偏心谷霍尔效应的普遍存在性；通过第一性原理计算在单层GeS₂中具体验证该效应，预测其谷霍尔角；提出通过非局域输运测量或谷-层耦合进行实验检测。
AI.result: 发现偏心谷霍尔效应在所有25个支持时间反演对称谷的层群中普遍存在；在单层GeS₂中预测到显著的谷霍尔角0.74；该效应具有内在几何性质，对温度和载流子密度变化高度鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 偏心谷霍尔效应揭示了谷霍尔物理中被忽视的关键方面，超越了传统谷霍尔效应范式，显著扩展了谷电子学的研究范围和应用潜力。

title: Nonadiabatic rare events from transition-path sampling of MASH trajectories
summary: Rare nonadiabatic reactions are a key component of many important molecular processes but are challenging to capture with direct dynamical simulations. In this paper, we combine our recently developed mapping approach to surface hopping (MASH) with transition-path sampling to create a framework to efficiently simulate these rare events. This is possible because MASH trajectories are Markovian, time-reversible and obey Liouville's theorem. The combined approach generates nonadiabatic reactive pathways without biasing the underlying dynamics. The resulting ensemble allows for a detailed analysis of reaction mechanisms and the unraveling of statistical and dynamical properties, including rate constants. We apply the method to study a spin-boson model in thermal equilibrium over a wide range of diabatic coupling strengths. Our results demonstrate how this approach provides a practical and systematic tool for investigating rare nonadiabatic processes, potentially beyond the reach of brute-force simulations.

AI.tldr: 将MASH（映射表面跳跃）与过渡路径采样结合，创建了一个高效模拟罕见非绝热反应事件的框架。
AI.motivation: 罕见非绝热反应是许多重要分子过程的关键组成部分，但通过直接动力学模拟难以捕捉。
AI.method: 结合MASH（映射表面跳跃）与过渡路径采样，利用MASH轨迹的马尔可夫性、时间可逆性和满足刘维尔定理的特性，构建不偏置底层动力学的非绝热反应路径生成框架。
AI.result: 该方法成功应用于热平衡自旋-玻色子模型，在广泛的非绝热耦合强度范围内有效工作，能够详细分析反应机制并揭示统计和动力学特性（包括速率常数）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为研究罕见非绝热过程提供了一个实用且系统化的工具，可能超越暴力模拟的能力范围。

title: Entanglement Rényi Negativity across the Finite-Temperature Transition in the O(3) Universality Class
summary: The fate of quantum entanglement at finite-temperature phase transitions remains an open question, particularly for continuous symmetry breaking where zero-temperature Goldstone modes generate long-range correlations. Using large-scale quantum Monte Carlo simulations, we investigate the third Rényi negativity across the O(3) transition in the three-dimensional Heisenberg antiferromagnet. The first such study for a thermal critical point with continuous symmetry. We uncover two fundamental results. First, the negativity exhibits a pure area law at the critical point, with the subleading constant term vanishing within statistical uncertainty. This demonstrates that thermal fluctuations completely destroy the long-range entanglement present at zero temperature. The divergent classical correlation length leaves no imprint on quantum entanglement itself. Second, despite this absence of singular behavior in the negativity, its temperature derivative follows the exact scaling of the specific heat, yielding critical exponents -α/ν=0.190(1) and 1/ν=1.350(5) in precise agreement with the O(3) universality class. Our work establishes that while quantum entanglement is blind to thermal criticality, its thermodynamic derivatives encode the full universal scaling, revealing an unexpected connection between entanglement and classical phase transitions. Furthermore, this also provides further evidence that Rényi negativity can still effectively shield classical correlations in systems with continuous symmetry.

AI.tldr: 量子纠缠在有限温度相变中的行为研究，发现O(3)临界点处纠缠服从纯面积律，热涨落完全破坏零温下的长程纠缠，但纠缠的温度导数却编码了完整的普适标度行为。
AI.motivation: 研究量子纠缠在有限温度相变中的命运，特别是连续对称性破缺情况下，零温Goldstone模产生的长程关联如何影响纠缠行为。
AI.method: 使用大规模量子蒙特卡洛模拟，研究三维海森堡反铁磁体O(3)相变中的第三Rényi负性，这是首次对具有连续对称性的热临界点进行此类研究。
AI.result: 1. 负性在临界点表现出纯面积律，次领头常数项在统计不确定性内消失，表明热涨落完全破坏了零温下的长程纠缠；2. 尽管负性本身没有奇异行为，但其温度导数遵循比热的精确标度，得到临界指数-α/ν=0.190(1)和1/ν=1.350(5)，与O(3)普适类精确一致。
AI.conclusion: 量子纠缠对热临界性"视而不见"，但其热力学导数编码了完整的普适标度，揭示了纠缠与经典相变之间的意外联系，同时证明Rényi负性在连续对称系统中仍能有效屏蔽经典关联。

title: Quantum Interference Breaks Bias Symmetry at Extended Superconducting Interfaces
summary: Particle-hole symmetry of the Bogoliubov-de~Gennes Hamiltonian is widely assumed to enforce bias-symmetric transport at superconducting interfaces. We show that this expectation fails generically for interfaces with finite spatial extent due to quantum interference. Using a tight-binding scattering formalism that preserves exact particle-hole symmetry, we demonstrate that propagation through an extended interface causes electrons and holes to accumulate unequal phases, leading to intrinsic bias-asymmetric conductance. The interface thereby acts as an effective Andreev interferometer with characteristic damped oscillations arising from coherent multiple reflections within the barrier. While the asymmetry originates from normal-state interference, its bias dependence is governed by the superconducting gap, which emerges as a sharp crossover scale that can be clearly resolved even when conventional coherence peaks are weak or absent. Thus we present bias asymmetry as an interferometric, spectroscopic probe of nonlocal interface physics and superconducting energy scales in hybrid and topological systems where extended interfaces are unavoidable.

AI.tldr: 粒子-空穴对称性通常被认为会强制超导界面产生偏压对称输运，但本文证明在有限空间扩展的界面中，量子干涉会导致固有偏压不对称电导。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为Bogoliubov-de Gennes哈密顿量的粒子-空穴对称性会强制超导界面产生偏压对称输运，但作者发现这一预期在有限空间扩展的界面中可能失效。
AI.method: 使用保持精确粒子-空穴对称性的紧束缚散射形式理论，分析电子和空穴在扩展界面中传播时积累的不相等相位，将界面建模为有效的Andreev干涉仪。
AI.result: 扩展界面导致电子和空穴积累不等相位，产生固有偏压不对称电导；界面作为Andreev干涉仪表现出特征性阻尼振荡；超导能隙作为尖锐交叉尺度出现，即使传统相干峰较弱或不存在也能清晰分辨。
AI.conclusion: 偏压不对称性可作为干涉测量学探针，用于探测非局域界面物理和超导能标，特别适用于扩展界面不可避免的混合和拓扑系统。

title: Information-Driven Phase Transition on Weighted Graphs with Spontaneous Dimensional Sensitivity
summary:
We study information flow on a weighted graph whose topology evolves according to a spectral curvature measure $\mathcal{R}$. The model (FIU) defines $\mathcal{R}$ from the diagonal of the graph Green function, propagates energy with curvature-dependent dissipation, and creates long-range links between high-$\mathcal{R}$ nodes at a rate controlled by a coupling parameter $g$.
  We report three results. First, the system exhibits a sharp phase transition at $g_c \approx 0.023$: below $g_c$, local information flux $σ$ and structure formation are anti-correlated; above $g_c$, they become strongly correlated (Pearson $r \approx 0.75$, $p < 10^{-38}$), with signatures of a continuous transition and mean-field exponent $ν\approx 0.54$.
  Second, we identify a node-level discrete Poisson relation $\nabla^2\mathcal{R}(i) = κ\,σ_{\rm prev}(i)$, where $κ$ is stable across parameters (CV $= 3.1\%$ across independent configurations). Mediator analysis reveals this correlation is almost entirely mediated by $\mathcal{R}$ itself, identifying it as the central self-organizing variable.
  Third, the Poisson relation exhibits spontaneous dimensional sensitivity: in 2D lattices both signals decay for $N \gtrsim 576$, while in 3D they persist to $N \lesssim 1728$. This emerges without any dimensional parameter in the rules. The collapse mechanism is curvature homogenization at large $N$. We interpret this as topological frustration in a mesoscopic regime, and discuss analogies with dimensional signatures of gravity.

AI.tldr: 加权图上的信息流模型（FIU）基于谱曲率演化拓扑，在耦合参数g_c≈0.023处出现相变，发现节点级泊松关系，并表现出自发维度敏感性。
AI.motivation: 研究加权图上信息流的动态特性，探索拓扑演化与信息传输之间的关联，特别是基于谱曲率度量的自组织行为。
AI.method: 提出FIU模型：使用图格林函数对角线定义谱曲率R，以曲率相关耗散传播能量，并通过耦合参数g控制高曲率节点间的长程连接形成速率。
AI.result: 1) 在g_c≈0.023处发现尖锐相变：低于g_c时局部信息流与结构形成负相关，高于g_c时强正相关（r≈0.75）；2) 发现节点级离散泊松关系∇²R(i)=κσ_prev(i)，κ稳定；3) 泊松关系表现出自发维度敏感性：2D中信号在N≳576时衰减，3D中持续到N≲1728。
AI.conclusion: 谱曲率R是中心自组织变量，系统表现出拓扑挫折和维度敏感性，与引力维度特征有类比关系，揭示了信息流与拓扑演化之间的深刻联系。

title: Co2SeO3Cl2: Studies of Emerging Magnetoelectric Coupling in a Polar, Buckled Honeycomb Material
summary: The development of magnetoelectric materials requires chemical design strategies that integrate structural polarity with magnetic lattices capable of supporting competing spin interactions. Here, we demonstrate such an approach in the polar, buckled honeycomb magnet Co2SeO3Cl2. Magnetization and heat-capacity measurements reveal strong magnetic anisotropy and four successive magnetic transitions at 25.4, 16.8, 11, and 3 K. The recovered magnetic entropy through the ordering regime is only around half of the expected 2Rln(2), indicating persistent spin fluctuations. Second-harmonic generation measurements show three pronounced intensity anomalies at 11, 17, and 26 K that coincide with magnetic transitions while revealing that the crystallographic symmetry is preserved. Together, these results demonstrate that polar, buckled honeycomb magnets offer an unconventional phase space for coupling magnetic and electric dipoles in magnetoelectric materials.

AI.tldr: 在极性褶皱蜂窝磁体Co2SeO3Cl2中发现四个磁相变，SHG测量显示磁相变与对称性保持共存，为磁电材料提供新设计策略
AI.motivation: 开发磁电材料需要整合结构极性与支持竞争自旋相互作用的磁性晶格的设计策略
AI.method: 通过磁化率和热容测量研究Co2SeO3Cl2的磁性性质，利用二次谐波生成测量分析磁相变与晶体对称性的关系
AI.result: 发现四个磁相变（25.4K、16.8K、11K、3K），强磁各向异性，磁熵仅为预期值一半表明持续自旋涨落，SHG显示磁相变但晶体对称性保持
AI.conclusion: 极性褶皱蜂窝磁体为磁电材料中磁偶极子和电偶极子的耦合提供了非常规的相空间

title: Extracting the Anyonic Exchange Phase from Hanbury Brown-Twiss Correlations
summary: In recent years, interferometry experiments in fractional quantum Hall devices have reported signatures of a fractional braiding phase for quasiparticles. It was noted, however, that the braiding phase alone does not uniquely determine the exchange phase because of a $π$-ambiguity. Here we analyze a Hanbury Brown-Twiss interferometer in a cross geometry that provides direct access to the fractional exchange phase. Using a non-equilibrium Keldysh calculation in an experimentally relevant regime, we show that the exchange phase can be obtained as the phase shift between Aharonov-Bohm oscillations in a single-particle interference current and those in the current cross-correlation arising from two-particle interference.

AI.tldr: 提出一种交叉几何的Hanbury Brown-Twiss干涉仪，通过单粒子干涉电流与双粒子干涉电流交叉关联之间的相位差，直接测量分数交换相位，解决了π-模糊性问题。
AI.motivation: 分数量子霍尔器件中的干涉实验虽然观测到了准粒子的分数编织相位，但编织相位单独不能唯一确定交换相位，存在π-模糊性问题。需要一种能够直接测量分数交换相位的方法。
AI.method: 设计交叉几何的Hanbury Brown-Twiss干涉仪，使用非平衡Keldysh计算在实验相关参数范围内，分析单粒子干涉电流的Aharonov-Bohm振荡与双粒子干涉电流交叉关联的Aharonov-Bohm振荡之间的相位差。
AI.result: 通过该方法可以直接获得分数交换相位，解决了编织相位测量中的π-模糊性问题，为分数统计的实验验证提供了更精确的方法。
AI.conclusion: 交叉几何的Hanbury Brown-Twiss干涉仪提供了一种直接测量分数交换相位的有效方法，克服了传统干涉测量中的π-模糊性限制，对分数统计的实验研究具有重要意义。

title: The Python Simulations of Chemistry Framework: 10 years of an open-source quantum chemistry project
summary: Over the past decade, the Python-based Simulations of Chemistry Framework (PySCF) has developed into a widely used open-source platform for electronic structure theory and quantum chemical method development. This article reviews the major advances since the previous overview in 2020, covering new modules and methodology, infrastructure changes, and performance benchmarks.

AI.tldr: PySCF框架自2020年以来的主要进展回顾，包括新模块、方法学、基础设施改进和性能基准测试
AI.motivation: 总结PySCF在过去十年中作为电子结构理论和量子化学方法开发开源平台的发展，特别是自2020年以来的重要进展
AI.method: 通过文献回顾的方式，系统梳理PySCF框架的新增模块、方法学创新、基础设施变化和性能评估
AI.result: 展示了PySCF作为一个成熟的开源平台在电子结构计算领域的持续发展和改进
AI.conclusion: PySCF已成为电子结构理论和量子化学方法开发的重要工具，其持续发展反映了开源科学软件社区的活跃和创新

title: Pressure induced redistribution of oxygen hole states in La$_{4}$Ni$_{3}$O$_{10}$
summary: Using density functional calculations and multi-orbital, multi-atom cluster exact diagonalization that includes local exchange and Coulomb interactions, we explored the local low-energy electronic states of trilayer La$_4$Ni$_3$O$_{10}$ via a minimal Ni$_3$O$_{14}$ cluster. We find that, at ambient pressure, starting with all three Ni being nominally 2+ valence, one of the two extra holes is localized in the central NiO$_2$ layer forming a Zhang-Rice singlet (ZRS) with $d_{x^2-y^2}$ orbital. The other hole mainly occupies the antibonding combination of the two interplane O $p_z$ orbitals and thereby hybridizes with an out-of-plane three-spin-polaron (3SP) formed by the $d_{z^2}$ orbitals of three NiO$_2$ layers. In this way, the in-plane spin orientation alternation is carried by the $d_{x^2-y^2}$ orbitals of two outer layers with interlayer antiferromagnetic correlation. Simultaneously, the central layer is insulating like with negligible magnetic moment. At high pressure, however, the two extra holes are concentrated on one of two outer layers and the inner layer separately forming the ZRS with $d_{x^2-y^2}$ orbitals or in-plane 3SP with neighboring cluster. We highlight the similarities between the bilayer La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ and trilayer La$_4$Ni$_3$O$_{10}$ via possible charge and spin ordered states suggested by our cluster results.

AI.tldr: 通过密度泛函计算和多轨道多原子团簇精确对角化，研究了三层La₄Ni₃O₁₀的局域低能电子态，发现在常压下两个额外空穴分别形成Zhang-Rice单重态和三维自旋极化子，高压下则形成不同的电荷和自旋有序态。
AI.motivation: 研究三层镍酸盐La₄Ni₃O₁₀的局域低能电子态，探索其在常压和高压下的电子结构、自旋构型和电荷分布，并与双层La₃Ni₂O₇进行对比，理解这些镍酸盐体系中的电子关联效应。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论计算和多轨道多原子团簇精确对角化方法，构建最小Ni₃O₁₄团簇模型，包含局域交换和库仑相互作用，分析电子态和自旋构型。
AI.result: 常压下：一个额外空穴在中心NiO₂层形成Zhang-Rice单重态（d_{x²-y²}轨道），另一个空穴主要占据两个层间O p_z轨道的反键组合，并与d_{z²}轨道形成的三维自旋极化子杂化。高压下：两个额外空穴分别集中在外层和中间层，形成不同的电荷和自旋有序态。
AI.conclusion: 三层La₄Ni₃O₁₀在常压和高压下表现出不同的电子态和自旋构型，揭示了层间电荷分布和自旋关联的复杂性。与双层La₃Ni₂O₇存在相似性，表明这些镍酸盐体系中可能存在类似的电荷和自旋有序态。

title: A Unified Understanding of the Experimental Controlling of the T$_\text{c}$ of Bilayer Nickelates
summary: Recently, a series of experiments which control the T$_\text{c}$ of the bilayer nickelates La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ through varying environmental conditions, including the rare-earth Sm/Nd substitution, the pressure on the bulk material, the compressive strain on the film and the hole doping through over-oxidation or alkaline earth element substitution have caught great interests. Here, we provide a unified understanding toward all these experiments based on the minimal single $d_{x^2-y^2}$-orbital bilayer $t-J_\parallel-J_\perp$ model proposed previously. With model parameters input from density-functional-theoretical calculations under varying experimental conditions, we adopt combined slave-boson-mean-field and density-matrix-renormalization-group approaches to solve the model and compare with experiments. Our results yield that, the bulk T$_\text{c}$ under pressure enhances with the Sm/Nd substitution fraction, the bulk T$_\text{c}$-pressure relation takes a dome shaped curve, the T$_\text{c}$ of the thin film enhances with compressive strain. The obtained parameters dependence of T$_\text{c}$ in these three experiments mainly originates from the variation of $J_\perp$ with experimental conditions. As for the hole doping, our results provide that T$_\text{c}$ decreases with the hole doping level $δ$, due to reduced density of state for the $d_{x^2-y^2}$-orbital. All these results are qualitatively consistent with experiments. We further conduct a comparative weak-coupling random-phase-approximation (RPA) based study on these experiments and find that our strong-coupling $t-J_\parallel-J_\perp$ model provides a more natural understanding of the experiments. We propose that electron doping implemented through substitution of La by element with higher valence, or further enhancement of the compressive strain in the film, can enhance T$_\text{c}$.

AI.tldr: 该研究基于单轨道双层t-J模型，统一解释了La₃Ni₂O₇在不同实验条件下（Sm/Nd替代、压力、应变、空穴掺杂）的超导转变温度变化规律，发现J⊥的变化是主要影响因素，并提出了增强Tc的潜在途径。
AI.motivation: 近期一系列实验通过不同环境条件（稀土元素替代、压力、应变、空穴掺杂）调控双层镍酸盐La₃Ni₂O₇的超导转变温度Tc，引起了广泛关注。需要对这些看似分散的实验现象提供一个统一的理论解释。
AI.method: 采用先前提出的最小单d_{x²-y²}轨道双层t-J∥-J⊥模型，结合密度泛函理论计算获得不同实验条件下的模型参数，使用slave-boson平均场和密度矩阵重整化群方法求解模型，并与实验对比。同时进行了弱耦合随机相位近似比较研究。
AI.result: 1) 压力下块体Tc随Sm/Nd替代比例增加而增强；2) 块体Tc-压力关系呈穹顶形曲线；3) 薄膜Tc随压缩应变增强而增加；4) 空穴掺杂导致Tc随掺杂水平δ降低。这些结果主要源于J⊥随实验条件的变化，与实验定性一致。强耦合t-J模型比弱耦合RPA方法能更自然地解释实验现象。
AI.conclusion: 基于强耦合t-J∥-J⊥模型能够统一解释La₃Ni₂O₇在各种实验条件下的超导行为，J⊥的变化是影响Tc的关键因素。提出通过高价元素替代实现电子掺杂，或进一步增加薄膜压缩应变，有望增强Tc。

title: Channel transport: gating, geometry, and heterogeneous diffusion
summary: Channel-mediated transport is ubiquitous in biology. A series of works by different theoreticians have sought to determine how the diffusive flux through a channel depends on (a) stochastic gating, (b) channel geometry, and (c) heterogeneous diffusion. In this paper, we derive an explicit estimate for the diffusive flux through a channel that accounts for these three factors. We show that our estimate is exact in certain parameter regimes. We further use stochastic simulations to confirm that our estimate remains accurate across a very broad range of parameters. Our estimate differs from some results in the physics literature.

AI.tldr: 本文推导了考虑随机门控、通道几何形状和异质扩散三个因素的通道扩散通量显式估计公式，该估计在特定参数范围内精确，并通过随机模拟验证了广泛参数范围内的准确性。
AI.motivation: 通道介导的运输在生物学中普遍存在，先前理论研究已分别探讨了随机门控、通道几何形状和异质扩散对扩散通量的影响，但缺乏综合考虑这三个因素的统一估计方法。
AI.method: 推导了考虑随机门控、通道几何形状和异质扩散的扩散通量显式估计公式，使用随机模拟验证估计的准确性，并与物理学文献中的结果进行比较。
AI.result: 提出的估计公式在特定参数范围内精确，随机模拟证实该估计在非常广泛的参数范围内保持准确，且与物理学文献中的某些结果存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 成功推导出综合考虑随机门控、通道几何形状和异质扩散三个关键因素的通道扩散通量估计公式，为理解生物通道运输提供了更全面的理论框架。

title: Analyzing coherent phonon mode-conversion in gradient superlattices with atomistic wave-packet simulations
summary: In this study, we have used atomistic phonon wave-packet simulations to investigate the manifestation of coherent phonons and phonon transmission in gradient superlattices (SL) based on ordered arrangements of varied SL period sizes. We specifically explore how coherent mode-conversion in these quasi-periodic structures changes as function of three key structural parameters: (1) the number of distinct period sizes, (2) the number of periods present for each distinct period size, and (3) the arrangement of period sizes in either an ascending or descending arrangement. Comparisons to periodic SLs and aperiodic SLs are highlighted, revealing that coherent phonons in gradient SLs generally exhibit behaviors characteristic of intermediate states between the fully ordered and disordered structures. Interestingly, changes to the short-range order of GMLs does not significantly influence transmission, indicating that long-range disorder is far more important to coherent mode-conversion. Our results indicate that manipulating the long-range disorder of interfaces could be an effective strategy to tailor phonon thermal conductivity of SL architectures.

AI.tldr: 通过原子声子波包模拟研究梯度超晶格中相干声子行为，发现其介于完全有序和无序结构之间，长程无序对相干模式转换影响更大，可调控界面长程无序来调节声子热导率。
AI.motivation: 研究梯度超晶格中相干声子的表现和传输特性，探索通过调控结构参数来理解声子在准周期结构中的行为，为调控超晶格热导率提供理论基础。
AI.method: 采用原子声子波包模拟方法，研究梯度超晶格中三个关键结构参数的影响：(1)不同周期尺寸的数量，(2)每个周期尺寸的周期数，(3)周期尺寸的排列顺序（升序或降序），并与周期性和非周期性超晶格进行比较。
AI.result: 梯度超晶格中的相干声子表现出介于完全有序和无序结构之间的中间态行为；短程有序变化对传输影响不大，长程无序对相干模式转换更为重要；调控界面长程无序可有效调节声子热导率。
AI.conclusion: 梯度超晶格中的相干声子行为介于有序和无序结构之间，长程无序是影响声子传输的关键因素，通过调控界面长程无序可成为调节超晶格声子热导率的有效策略。

title: Finite-Time Braiding Dynamics within Topological Nanowire Qubits
summary: Topological Quantum Computing has largely evolved towards a paradigm of manipulating edge localized Majorana within $p$-wave topological superconducting nanowires. To bridge the gap between physical qubit systems and quantum algorithms, we perform a dynamical analysis to extend what is known in the adiabatic regime, providing time-dependent gate elements for further qubit and algorithm modeling efforts. Our analysis covers dynamical considerations for two methods of shuttling domain edge bound Majoranas in a single nanowire system which both function by applying spatiotemporally dependent onsite and hopping parameters within the system's Hamiltonian. We then complicate this model by converting it into the T-qubit to calculate the finite-time gate representation of the shuttling techniques used in a more practical setting. These contributions provide insight for realistic experimental setups in the next-generation of qubit implementation and will hopefully facilitate fault tolerant scalable systems and universal gate design.

AI.tldr: 该论文对拓扑量子计算中的Majorana费米子穿梭技术进行动力学分析，扩展了绝热区域的知识，为量子比特和算法建模提供时间依赖的门操作元素。
AI.motivation: 当前拓扑量子计算主要基于p波拓扑超导纳米线中边缘局域Majorana费米子的操控，需要弥合物理量子比特系统与量子算法之间的差距，为实际实验设置提供指导。
AI.method: 1) 对单纳米线系统中两种穿梭域边缘束缚Majorana费米子的方法进行动力学分析；2) 通过施加系统哈密顿量中时空依赖的现场和跳跃参数实现穿梭；3) 将模型转化为T-qubit以计算有限时间门表示。
AI.result: 提供了时间依赖的门操作元素，可用于进一步的量子比特和算法建模，为下一代量子比特实现的现实实验设置提供见解。
AI.conclusion: 这些贡献有助于促进容错可扩展系统和通用门设计，为拓扑量子计算的实验实现提供实用指导。

title: Carbon black and hydrogen production from methane pyrolysis: measured and modeled insights from integrated gas and particle diagnostics in shock tubes
comment: 18 pages, 18 figures, 1 table. Includes Supplementary Material. Submitted to Carbon
summary: Methane (CH4) pyrolysis is a promising route to co-produce hydrogen (H2) and carbon black (CB) while avoiding emissions associated with steam-methane reforming and furnace black processes. Model development of pyrolytic CB synthesis requires experimental observations of concurrent gas chemistry, particulate formation, and morphology. This work presents a combined experimental and modeling study of CH4 pyrolysis behind reflected shock waves in 5% CH4/Argon mixtures at post-reflected shock temperatures (T5) of 1850-2450 K and P5 around 4.5 atm. Laser absorption diagnostics quantified CH4, C2H4, and C2H2 mole fractions, while multiwavelength extinction (633 and 1064 nm) resolved time-dependent particle formation and the temperature-dependent evolution of optical maturity. Simulations reproduce small-molecule speciation well, but large variations in predicted polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbons (PAHs) persist among models. Coupled gas-particle simulations capture accurate volume fraction (fv) trends and the influence of gas dynamics but underpredict induction times at high T5. Samples collected at the shock tube endwall were analyzed by transmission electron microscopy (TEM) to quantify primary particle size distributions and nanostructure arrangement. Image segmentation and manual measurements showed reduced primary particle size growth (dp) with increasing T5, while graphitic nanostructure generally increased. This study provides an integrated benchmark for improving models of CB and H2 production from CH4 pyrolysis by constraining gas-phase kinetics, PAH-driven inception, particle dynamics, and particle maturity. The results highlight that accurate partitioning of mass between particle number and particle size is an important constraint for further model development.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过激波管实验和模型模拟，系统研究了甲烷热解过程中气体化学、颗粒形成和形态演化的协同作用，为碳黑和氢气生产的模型改进提供了综合基准。
AI.motivation: 甲烷热解是同时生产氢气和碳黑的有前景途径，但需要实验观测气体化学、颗粒形成和形态的协同演化来支持模型开发。现有模型在预测多环芳烃和颗粒动力学方面存在较大差异。
AI.method: 采用激波管实验与模型模拟相结合的方法：1）在5% CH4/Ar混合物中，于1850-2450 K温度范围和约4.5 atm压力下进行反射激波后甲烷热解实验；2）使用激光吸收诊断量化CH4、C2H4和C2H2摩尔分数；3）采用多波长消光（633和1064 nm）解析时间依赖性颗粒形成和光学成熟度演化；4）进行耦合气体-颗粒模拟；5）通过透射电子显微镜分析收集的样品，量化初级颗粒尺寸分布和纳米结构排列。
AI.result: 1）模拟能很好再现小分子物种分布，但多环芳烃预测存在较大模型间差异；2）耦合气体-颗粒模拟能准确捕获体积分数趋势和气体动力学影响，但在高温度下低估诱导时间；3）TEM分析显示随着温度升高，初级颗粒尺寸增长减小，而石墨纳米结构普遍增加。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为改进甲烷热解生产碳黑和氢气的模型提供了综合基准，通过约束气相动力学、多环芳烃驱动的成核、颗粒动力学和颗粒成熟度。结果强调，准确分配颗粒数量和颗粒尺寸之间的质量是进一步模型开发的重要约束条件。

title: Crystal structure, magnetic and resonant properties of decorated spin kagome system (CsCl)Cu$_5$As$_2$O$_{10}$
summary: We report the synthesis and investigation of the crystal structure and physical properties of the averievite-like arsenate, $(\mathrm{CsCl})\mathrm{Cu}_5\mathrm{As}_2\mathrm{O}_{10}$. Just above room temperature, this compound undergoes a structural phase transition from the high-temperature trigonal $P\bar{3}m1$ $(a=b=a_0$ and $c=c_0)$ to the low-temperature monoclinic $I2/a$ phase $(a \approx \sqrt{3}a_0$, $b=a_0$, $c \approx 2c_0$ and $β\approx 90.6^\circ)$. According to thermodynamic and nuclear magnetic resonance measurements, it experiences a phase transition into a canted antiferromagnetic state at $T_N = 21~\mathrm{K}$. The density functional theory calculations place the energy scale of kagome exchange interaction parameter in $(\mathrm{CsCl})\mathrm{Cu}_5\mathrm{As}_2\mathrm{O}_{10}$ in between those in V- and P-analogs.

AI.tldr: 该论文报道了一种averievite-like砷酸盐(CsCl)Cu₅As₂O₁₀的合成、晶体结构和物理性质研究，发现其在室温以上发生结构相变，并在21K进入倾斜反铁磁态。
AI.motivation: 研究averievite-like砷酸盐化合物的晶体结构和物理性质，探索其结构相变和磁相变行为，特别是kagome晶格交换相互作用在V-和P-类似物之间的能量尺度。
AI.method: 合成(CsCl)Cu₅As₂O₁₀化合物，通过晶体结构分析、热力学测量、核磁共振(NMR)测量和密度泛函理论(DFT)计算来研究其性质。
AI.result: 该化合物在室温以上发生从高温三方相(P-3m1)到低温单斜相(I2/a)的结构相变，并在21K进入倾斜反铁磁态。DFT计算显示其kagome交换相互作用的能量尺度介于V-和P-类似物之间。
AI.conclusion: 成功合成并表征了averievite-like砷酸盐(CsCl)Cu₅As₂O₁₀，揭示了其结构相变和磁相变特性，为理解kagome晶格材料的交换相互作用提供了新见解。

title: Probing the Meissner effect in single crystals of $\mathbf{Bi_2Sr_2Ca_2Cu_3O_{10+δ}}$ via wide-field quantum microscopy under high pressure
summary: We investigated the pressure dependence of the superconducting transition temperature ($T_{\rm c}$) in optimally doped Bi$_2$Sr$_2$Ca$_2$Cu$_3$O$_{10+δ}$ (Bi-2223) single crystals using different pressure-transmitting media. Previous high-pressure studies have reported conflicting behaviors, ranging from a resurgence of $T_{\rm c}$ of optimally doped Bi-2223 in fluid media to an insulating-like transition in solid media. However, a direct comparison of the effects of different pressure-transmitting media is lacking. Here, we employed wide-field quantum microscopy based on nitrogen-vacancy centers to probe the magnetic response under high pressure, utilizing cBN and KBr as media. We observed that a diamagnetic response near 70 K, indicative of the superconducting transition, persisted up to 23 GPa in KBr, whereas it disappeared above 11 GPa and 70 K in cBN. These results demonstrate the high sensitivity of Bi-2223 to the pressure environment and highlight the critical role of hydrostatic pressure in cuprate superconductors.

AI.tldr: 研究使用不同传压介质（cBN和KBr）对最佳掺杂Bi-2223超导体的Tc压力依赖性，发现介质选择显著影响超导行为
AI.motivation: 先前关于最佳掺杂Bi-2223的高压研究存在矛盾结果：流体介质中Tc可能回升，而固体介质中可能出现绝缘化转变。缺乏不同传压介质的直接比较研究。
AI.method: 采用基于氮空位中心的宽场量子显微镜技术，在高压下探测磁响应。分别使用cBN（立方氮化硼）和KBr（溴化钾）作为传压介质进行对比实验。
AI.result: 在KBr介质中，70K附近的抗磁响应（指示超导转变）持续到23GPa；而在cBN介质中，该响应在11GPa以上和70K时消失。表明Bi-2223对压力环境高度敏感。
AI.conclusion: Bi-2223超导体对压力环境极为敏感，传压介质的选择显著影响超导行为。这强调了静水压力条件在铜氧化物超导体研究中的关键作用。

title: Vacuum Wannier Functions for First-Principles Scattering and Photoemission
comment: 8 pages and 4 figures. Supplemental material in supplemental.pdf. In review at Phys. Rev. Lett
summary: We establish a first-principles theory of vacuum Wannier functions unifying tight-binding and nearly-free-electron descriptions across solid-vacuum interfaces. Analytic solutions for canonical Wannier functions in arbitrary dimension and disentangled functions in 1D motivate a numerically verified 3D Wannier close-packing principle, enabling dense k-space construction of full Born-series scattering states at interfaces and thus predictive photoemission calculations without semiempirical vacuum potentials. Applications to graphene and h-BN reveal corrections beyond the first-Born approximation.

AI.tldr: 提出真空Wannier函数的第一性原理理论，统一紧束缚和近自由电子描述，实现无需半经验真空势的预测性光电子发射计算
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理固体-真空界面时需要半经验真空势，缺乏统一的理论框架来连接固体内部的紧束缚描述和真空区域的近自由电子描述
AI.method: 建立真空Wannier函数的第一性原理理论，推导任意维度的规范Wannier函数解析解，提出3D Wannier紧密堆积原理，通过密集k空间构造完整的Born级数散射态
AI.result: 成功应用于石墨烯和六方氮化硼，揭示了超越第一Born近似的修正效应，实现了无需半经验真空势的预测性光电子发射计算
AI.conclusion: 真空Wannier函数理论为固体-真空界面提供了统一的理论框架，能够准确预测光电子发射特性，超越了传统半经验方法的局限性

title: Possibilities of applying boundary functionals of random processes to nuclear safety problems
summary: The potential for using boundary functionals of random risk processes to solve nuclear safety problems at nuclear power plants is assessed. In certain situations (MSRs (Molten Salt Reactors), High-Temperature Gas-Cooled Reactors (HTGRs), pulverized fuel reactors, reactor startups, and accident analysis (core collapse)), neutron behavior changes significantly. Neutron clustering begins to play an important role, and the distributions characterizing neutron behavior change. The normal distribution is replaced by stable, but also limiting, distributions. Boundary functionals allow for precise calculation of the power quantile and provide a mathematical bridge between abstract directed percolation and engineering calculations of protection settings.

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了使用随机风险过程的边界泛函解决核电站核安全问题的潜力，特别是在中子行为发生显著变化的情况下。
AI.motivation: 在熔盐堆、高温气冷堆、粉状燃料堆、反应堆启动和事故分析等情况下，中子行为发生显著变化，中子聚类开始发挥重要作用，描述中子行为的分布从正态分布变为稳定分布和极限分布，需要新的数学工具来解决这些核安全问题。
AI.method: 采用随机风险过程的边界泛函方法，该方法能够精确计算功率分位数，并在抽象定向渗流理论与工程保护设置计算之间建立数学桥梁。
AI.result: 边界泛函方法被证明能够有效处理中子行为分布变化的情况，为核安全问题的精确计算提供了数学工具。
AI.conclusion: 边界泛函方法在解决核电站核安全问题上具有潜力，特别是在中子行为发生显著变化的特殊情况下，能够提供精确的功率分位数计算，并连接理论模型与工程实践。

title: Competing Magnetic Ground States in Copper-Doped Pb$_{10}$P$_{6}$O$_{25}$
summary: We investigate the electronic and magnetic properties of copper-doped Pb$_{10}$(PO$_4$)$_6$O using a combination of density functional theory and many-body perturbation theory. The flat half-filled electronic band at the Fermi level is found to give way to an incommensurate antiferromagnetic instability with wave vector $(0.28π,\pm 0.47π,π)$ within the random phase approximation arising predominantly from Cu-$d_{yz}$ and Cu-$d_{xz}$ orbitals. Moreover, the Heisenberg exchange coupling between neighboring copper atoms is estimated to be $\sim 1$ meV. Our results suggest that magnetism in copper-doped Pb$_{10}$(PO$_4$)$_6$O is localized on the impurity copper site, with no long-range ordering. These findings support the picture that copper behaves as a magnetic impurity within the Pb-apatite matrix.

AI.tldr: 铜掺杂Pb10(PO4)6O的电子和磁性性质研究，发现费米能级处的平半填充电子带导致非公度反铁磁不稳定性，铜作为磁性杂质存在于磷灰石基质中。
AI.motivation: 研究铜掺杂磷灰石材料Pb10(PO4)6O的电子和磁性性质，探索铜杂质在该材料中的行为及其对磁性的影响。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论和多体微扰理论相结合的方法，通过随机相位近似分析电子结构，并估算铜原子间的海森堡交换耦合。
AI.result: 费米能级处的平半填充电子带导致非公度反铁磁不稳定性（波矢(0.28π,±0.47π,π)），主要源于Cu-dyz和Cu-dxz轨道。相邻铜原子间的海森堡交换耦合约为1 meV，磁性局域在铜杂质位点，无长程有序。
AI.conclusion: 铜在磷灰石基质中表现为磁性杂质，磁性局域在铜位点，无长程磁有序，支持铜作为磁性杂质的图像。

title: Imaging Harmonic Generation of Magnons
comment: 15 pages in two column format, 10 figures
summary: This work combines theory and experiment to examine the mechanisms underlying the harmonic generation of magnons. We develop a nonlinear spin-wave framework that is directly analogous to harmonic generation in nonlinear optics, and combine it with scanning nitrogen-vacancy (NV) center magnetometry to image and quantify magnonic harmonic generation in a Ni$_{81}$Fe$_{19}$/Pt microstripe. Within this framework, the harmonic response arises from nonlinear magnetization dynamics localized at strongly inhomogeneous textures, such as the sample edges and domain walls, that act as anharmonic confining potentials. Scanning probe imaging confirms that the harmonic response is correspondingly nonuniform and concentrated near the sample edges. We measure an expected nonlinear power-law scaling, a systematic shift toward larger wavevector excitations at higher harmonic order, and a spin-selective response indicative of an increasingly chiral harmonic stray field. These results provide a microscopic understanding of magnonic harmonic generation and highlight its potential for engineering nonlinear functionality in magnonic systems.

AI.tldr: 该研究结合理论与实验，揭示了磁振子谐波产生的微观机制，发现非线性磁化动力学主要发生在样品边缘和畴壁等强非均匀区域，这些区域作为非谐限制势能驱动谐波响应。
AI.motivation: 研究磁振子谐波产生的物理机制，为磁子系统的非线性功能设计提供理论基础。磁振子谐波类似于非线性光学中的谐波产生，但具体机制尚不明确，需要结合理论和实验手段进行深入探究。
AI.method: 开发了与非线性光学谐波产生直接类比的非线性自旋波理论框架，并结合扫描氮空位中心磁强计技术，对Ni81Fe19/Pt微条带中的磁振子谐波产生进行成像和量化分析。
AI.result: 实验证实谐波响应在空间上不均匀，主要集中在样品边缘区域；观察到预期的非线性幂律标度关系；发现高次谐波向更大波矢激发偏移；测量到自旋选择性响应，表明谐波杂散场具有增强的手性特征。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了磁振子谐波产生的微观理解，揭示了非线性磁化动力学在强非均匀纹理中的局域化特性，为磁子系统的非线性功能工程化设计开辟了新途径。

title: Auto-WHATMD : Automated Wasserstein-based High-dimensional feature extraction Analysis of Trajectories from Molecular Dynamics
summary: Comparing multiple protein systems with variation such as different binding ligands or mutations, and understanding their effects is one of the objectives in molecular dynamics simulations. Representation of these systems by a few features enables quantitative comparison. However, because molecular dynamics simulation trajectories are high-dimensional spatiotemporal data, selection of key features relies on domain expertise, sometimes introducing arbitrary assumptions. Here, we present an approach that uses the optimal transport distance to compare high-dimensional trajectory data, and employs simulated annealing to identify the residues that best distinguish multiple systems. We term this algorithm auto-WHATMD (automated Wasserstein-based High-dimensional feature extraction Analysis for Trajectories of Molecular Dynamics). We applied auto-WHATMD to multiple protein-ligand systems of bromodomain 4 with different ligands, identifying the most discriminative residues in the loop region. Moreover, even a few selected residues were sufficient to capture the correlation with ligand-binding affinities, indicating that auto-WHATMD effectively prioritizes the most informative residues. Our approach can be used to efficiently determine key residues and design features for multiple analogous systems.

AI.tldr: 提出auto-WHATMD算法，利用最优传输距离和模拟退火从分子动力学轨迹中自动识别区分多个蛋白质系统的关键残基，无需依赖领域专家知识。
AI.motivation: 分子动力学模拟中，比较不同配体或突变的蛋白质系统并理解其影响是重要目标。传统方法依赖领域专家选择关键特征，可能引入主观假设，需要自动化的特征提取方法。
AI.method: 开发auto-WHATMD算法：1) 使用最优传输距离(Wasserstein距离)比较高维轨迹数据；2) 采用模拟退火算法识别最能区分多个系统的残基；3) 自动化提取高维特征。
AI.result: 应用于溴结构域4与不同配体的系统，成功识别出环区最具区分性的残基。即使仅选择少量残基，也能捕捉与配体结合亲和力的相关性，证明算法能有效优先选择信息量最大的残基。
AI.conclusion: auto-WHATMD能高效确定关键残基并为多个类似系统设计特征，减少对领域专家知识的依赖，提供客观的特征选择方法。

title: Disentangling Tensor Network States with Deep Neural Network
summary: We introduce Neural Tensor Network States ($ν$TNS), a variational many-body wave-function ansatz that integrates deep neural networks with tensor-network architectures. In the $ν$TNS framework, a neural network serves as a disentangler of the wave-function, transforming the physical degrees of freedom into renormalized variables with much less entanglement. The renormalized state is then efficiently encoded by a back-flow tensor network. This construction yields a compact yet highly expressive representation of strongly correlated quantum states. Using convolutional neural networks combined with matrix product states as a concrete implementation, we obtain state-of-the-art variational energies for the spin-$1/2$ $J_1$-$J_2$ Heisenberg model on the square lattice at the highly frustrated point $J_2/J_1=0.5$, for systems up to $20\times 20$ with periodic boundary conditions. Finite-size scaling of spin, dimer, and plaquette correlations exhibits power-law decay without magnetic or valence-bond long-range order, consistent with a gapless quantum spin-liquid ground state at that point.This $ν$TNS framework is flexible and naturally extensible to other neural and tensor-network structures, offering a general platform for investigating strongly correlated quantum many-body systems.

AI.tldr: 提出神经张量网络态(νTNS)，一种将深度神经网络与张量网络架构结合的变分多体波函数拟设，用于高效表示强关联量子态。
AI.motivation: 传统张量网络方法在处理强关联系统时表达能力有限，而神经网络虽然表达能力强大但缺乏物理结构。需要一种结合两者优势的方法来更有效地表示复杂量子态。
AI.method: νTNS框架中，神经网络作为波函数的解纠缠器，将物理自由度转换为纠缠度低得多的重整化变量，然后通过回流张量网络高效编码重整化态。具体实现采用卷积神经网络结合矩阵乘积态。
AI.result: 在自旋-1/2 J1-J2海森堡模型的强阻挫点J2/J1=0.5上，对20×20周期边界系统获得了最先进的变分能量。有限尺寸标度分析显示自旋、二聚体和晶格关联呈现幂律衰减，无磁或价键长程有序，支持该点为无能隙量子自旋液体基态。
AI.conclusion: νTNS框架灵活且可扩展，为研究强关联量子多体系统提供了一个通用平台，结合了神经网络的高表达能力和张量网络的物理结构优势。

title: Hidden Zeeman Field in Odd-Parity Magnets: An Ideal Platform for Topological Superconductivity
summary: Odd-parity magnets (OPMs) have emerged as a fundamental class of unconventional magnetisms, characterized by time-reversal-preserving non-relativistic spin splitting (NSS). Despite growing interest, the fundamental understanding of OPMs remains critically incomplete, as previous studies have focused exclusively on NSS while overlooking the intrinsically broken time-reversal symmetry ($\mathcal{T}$) inherent to magnetic order. In this work, we reveal that OPMs universally host a hidden Zeeman field rooted in this $\mathcal{T}$-breaking, which fundamentally reshapes their band structure. Through an analytical $f$-wave magnet model, we show that NSS microscopically originates from an emergent gauge field, manifesting as a real-space spin loop current order. Crucially, the large NSS (eV scale) enables conventional superconductivity to coexist robustly with the hidden Zeeman field, with Zeeman splitting reaches hundreds of meV. This unique band structure establishes OPMs as an ideal platform for topological superconductors (TSCs), supporting large topological regions. Based on OPMs, we engineer a series of TSCs hosting distinct Majorana boundary modes, including unidirectional Majorana edge states. Our work corrects a fundamental misconception about OPMs and establishes them as a versatile platform for field-free and robust TSCs.

AI.tldr: 该论文揭示了奇宇称磁体（OPMs）中隐藏的塞曼场，修正了对其基本理解，并证明OPMs是构建无外场拓扑超导体的理想平台。
AI.motivation: 先前对奇宇称磁体的研究仅关注非相对论性自旋分裂（NSS），而忽略了磁序中固有的时间反演对称性破缺。这种不完整的理解阻碍了对OPMs作为拓扑超导体平台的深入认识。
AI.method: 通过解析的f波磁体模型，揭示了NSS起源于一种涌现规范场，表现为实空间自旋环流序。利用OPMs的大尺度NSS（eV量级）与隐藏塞曼场的共存特性，设计了一系列拓扑超导体。
AI.result: 发现OPMs普遍存在源于时间反演对称性破缺的隐藏塞曼场，该场从根本上重塑了能带结构。基于OPMs构建的拓扑超导体具有大拓扑区域，支持包括单向马约拉纳边缘态在内的多种马约拉纳边界模式。
AI.conclusion: 该工作修正了对奇宇称磁体的基本误解，确立了OPMs作为无外场且鲁棒的拓扑超导体的多功能平台，为拓扑量子计算提供了新途径。

title: Intrinsic Error Thresholds in Nearly Critical Toric Codes
summary: We study the protection of information in nearly critical topological quantum codes, constructed by perturbing topological stabilizer codes towards continuous quantum phase transitions. Our focus is on the transverse-field toric code subjected to local Pauli decoherence. Despite the strong quantum fluctuations of anyons when the transverse field is tuned infinitesimally close to the critical point, we show that a finite strength of Pauli decoherence remains necessary to irreversibly destroy information encoded in the ground-state manifold. Using a replica statistical physics mapping for the coherent information, we show that decoherence can be understood as introducing a two-dimensional inter-replica defect within a three-dimensional replica statistical physics model. A field theoretical analysis shows that this defect is perturbatively irrelevant to the bulk critical point, and cannot renormalize the transverse field strength, leading to a finite error threshold. We argue that a qualitatively similar conclusion can be drawn for a broad class of nearly critical topological codes, under a variety of decoherence channels.

AI.tldr: 在近临界拓扑量子码中，即使系统被调到接近量子相变临界点，有限强度的泡利退相干仍然是破坏编码信息所必需的。
AI.motivation: 研究在接近临界点的拓扑量子码中信息的保护机制，特别是当系统受到局部泡利退相干影响时，量子涨落是否会降低编码的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 使用横向场环面码作为模型系统，通过副本统计物理映射分析相干信息，将退相干理解为三维副本统计物理模型中的二维副本间缺陷。
AI.result: 场论分析表明，退相干引入的缺陷在临界点处是微扰无关的，不能重整化横向场强度，因此存在有限的误差阈值。
AI.conclusion: 对于广泛的近临界拓扑码和多种退相干通道，都存在类似的有限误差阈值，表明量子临界性不会显著降低拓扑编码对退相干的鲁棒性。

title: Revealing Hydroxide Ion Transport Mechanisms in Commercial Anion-Exchange Membranes at Nano-Scale from Machine-learned Interatomic Potential Simulations
summary: Hydroxide ion transport in anion-exchange membranes fundamentally limits the efficiency of alkaline water electrolysis for green hydrogen production, yet the atomic-scale transport mechanisms remain poorly understood due to the computational challenges associated with modeling ion dynamics. Given that anion-exchange membranes enable alkaline electrolysis with abundant catalysts while avoiding perfluoroalkyl and polyfluoroalkyl materials, a deeper mechanistic understanding of hydroxide transport in these systems is essential for advancing sustainable hydrogen production. Here, we show that large-scale molecular dynamics simulations with fine-tuned machine-learned interatomic potentials provide atomistic insight into hydroxide mobility in a commercial membrane over tens of nanoseconds and over ten nanometer. We find that increasing water content transforms isolated water clusters into a connected hydrogen-bond network that enables long-range proton transfer. Under dry conditions hydroxide ions are trapped near positively charged groups and transport is strongly hindered, whereas well-hydrated membranes exhibit extended proton migration and diffusion coefficients approaching those of dilute aqueous solutions. The simulations reproduce experimental trends in diffusion and activation energies. Our results establish a direct link between nano-scale structure and macroscopic transport. Beyond mechanistic insight, the presented simulation framework enables predictive, simulation-guided optimization of membrane chemistry and architecture, opening a pathway toward the rational design of more efficient anion-exchange membranes for green hydrogen technologies.

AI.tldr: 通过大规模分子动力学模拟和机器学习势函数，揭示了阴离子交换膜中氢氧根离子的原子尺度传输机制，发现水含量对质子传输网络形成的关键作用
AI.motivation: 阴离子交换膜中氢氧根离子传输是碱性水电解制绿氢效率的关键限制因素，但原子尺度传输机制因计算挑战而未被充分理解，需要深入研究以推进可持续氢能技术
AI.method: 采用大规模分子动力学模拟结合精细调优的机器学习原子间势函数，对商业膜中的氢氧根迁移进行数十纳秒、十纳米尺度的原子级模拟
AI.result: 水含量增加将孤立水簇转变为连接的氢键网络，实现长程质子传输；干燥条件下氢氧根离子被束缚在正电荷基团附近，传输受阻；充分水合膜中质子迁移扩展，扩散系数接近稀溶液水平
AI.conclusion: 建立了纳米尺度结构与宏观传输的直接联系，提出的模拟框架可实现膜化学和结构的预测性优化，为理性设计更高效的绿氢用阴离子交换膜开辟途径

title: Magnetic-field-induced superconductivity in hexalayer rhombohedral graphene
summary: In conventional superconductors, superconductivity is generally suppressed by external magnetic fields due to spin-singlet pairing. Here, we report signatures of in-plane-magnetic-field-induced superconductivity in hexalayer rhombohedral graphene and reveal electric-field control of its depairing behavior. With the application of a small in-plane magnetic field $B_{\parallel}$, a superconducting state emerges within a narrow band along a phase boundary.
