Its properties evolve continuously with increasing $B_{\parallel}$: the superconducting region progressively shifts toward higher electric field as the $B_{\parallel}$ increases and the transition temperature rises with increasing $B_{\parallel}$. Remarkably, the superconducting state remains robust under $B_{\parallel}$ up to 14 T, far exceeding the conventional Pauli limit. Quantum oscillation measurements further reveal that the superconductivity emerges from nematic Fermi surface reconstruction. These results suggest a spin-polarized superconducting states with unconventional origins.

AI.tldr: 在六层菱面体石墨烯中发现了面内磁场诱导的超导现象，该超导态在高达14T的磁场下仍保持稳定，远超传统泡利极限，表现出非常规的自旋极化超导特性。
AI.motivation: 传统超导体中，外部磁场通常会抑制自旋单重态配对导致的超导性。本研究旨在探索在石墨烯体系中，面内磁场是否可能诱导出非常规的超导态。
AI.method: 使用六层菱面体石墨烯作为研究平台，通过施加面内磁场（B∥）并测量其超导响应。利用电场调控超导配对行为，并通过量子振荡测量揭示费米面重构。
AI.result: 1. 在施加小面内磁场时，沿相边界出现窄带超导态；2. 超导区域随B∥增加向高电场方向移动；3. 转变温度随B∥增加而升高；4. 超导态在高达14T的面内磁场下保持稳定；5. 量子振荡显示超导源于向列费米面重构。
AI.conclusion: 该研究发现了面内磁场诱导的自旋极化超导态，具有非常规起源，为探索新型超导机制和拓扑超导提供了新平台。

title: Ab Initio Transfer Length Method Simulations of Tunneling Limits in 2D Semiconductors
summary: As semiconductor devices approach the sub-2 nm technology node, identifying the quantum-mechanical limits of contact-resistance scaling becomes imperative; however, the transition from thermionic emission to direct tunneling in this deep nanoscale regime remains experimentally inaccessible and theoretically undefined. Herein, we present a systematic first-principles framework to characterize metal/2D-semiconductor interfaces at the atomic scale and identify their intrinsic contact resistance and tunneling limits. Based on large-scale multi-space density functional theory calculations, we perform ab initio transmission line model (TLM) analyses for monolayer MoS2 contacted by Sc, Ag, Au, and Pd electrodes in both top-contact and edge-contact geometries. This computational procedure reveals a universal transition in resistance scaling from metal-induced gap states-mediated direct tunneling in the sub-10 nm regime to thermionic emission at longer channel lengths. The resulting transition length provides a rigorous first-principles measure of the critical tunneling length, establishing a physically grounded metric for assessing contact quality and the source-to-drain tunneling limit of 2D ballistic transistors. Using the ab initio TLM method, we further identify optimal contact strategies-top contact with low-work-function metals for n-type operation and edge contact with high-work-function metals for p-type operation. Our study introduces a general computational framework for evaluating and comparing 2D semiconductor contacts and offers practical guidelines for engineering low-resistance, scalable contact technologies for next-generation 2D transistors.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过第一性原理计算框架，系统分析了2D半导体在亚2纳米节点的接触电阻缩放极限，揭示了从直接隧穿到热电子发射的普适转变，并提出了优化接触策略。
AI.motivation: 随着半导体器件接近亚2纳米技术节点，需要确定接触电阻缩放的量子力学极限。在深纳米尺度下，从热电子发射到直接隧穿的转变在实验上难以实现，理论上也未明确定义。
AI.method: 采用大规模多空间密度泛函理论计算，对单层MoS2与Sc、Ag、Au、Pd电极的顶接触和边缘接触进行第一性原理传输线模型分析，建立了系统的计算框架。
AI.result: 发现了电阻缩放的普适转变：亚10纳米区域为金属诱导带隙态介导的直接隧穿，较长沟道长度时为热电子发射。转变长度提供了临界隧穿长度的第一性原理度量，并确定了最佳接触策略：n型操作采用低功函数金属顶接触，p型操作采用高功函数金属边缘接触。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为评估和比较2D半导体接触提供了通用计算框架，并为下一代2D晶体管工程化低电阻、可扩展接触技术提供了实用指导。

title: Explicit, Machine-Learned Two-Body Potentials for Molecular Simulations
summary: A new pairwise hybrid machine-learning/molecular mechanics (ML/MM) potential is introduced that is conceived for application to large, heterogeneous condensed-phase systems. The PhysNet ML method describes monomers and short-range dimer interactions, while a classical MM force field describes pairwise interactions beyond a defined switching distance. Models are fitted to MP2 dimer and pairwise cluster energies, and the quality of each model is assessed at different switching distances and using MM approaches with and without detailed distributed charge electrostatics. The applicability of the approach to molecular dynamics simulations is demonstrated for a basic implementation applied to a small model system. Dichloromethane and acetone are used as test systems to demonstrate the accuracy of the approach in describing pairwise reference data, and also to highlight the limitations of the pairwise approach for systems that exhibit significant many-body effects in condensed phase, paving the way for the addition of a general many-body correction in future work.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的混合机器学习/分子力学(ML/MM)势能函数，用于大型异质凝聚相系统，通过ML处理单体及短程二聚体相互作用，MM处理长程相互作用，并在二氯甲烷和丙酮系统中验证了准确性。
AI.motivation: 开发适用于大型异质凝聚相系统的准确势能函数，传统分子力学方法在描述复杂相互作用时精度有限，而纯量子化学方法计算成本过高，需要结合机器学习的精度和分子力学的效率。
AI.method: 提出混合ML/MM方法：PhysNet机器学习描述单体和短程二聚体相互作用，经典MM力场描述超过切换距离的成对相互作用。模型基于MP2二聚体和成对团簇能量拟合，评估不同切换距离和MM方法（包含/不包含详细分布式电荷静电学）。
AI.result: 在二氯甲烷和丙酮测试系统中验证了方法对成对参考数据的准确性，展示了在小模型系统中进行分子动力学模拟的可行性，同时揭示了成对方法在具有显著多体效应的凝聚相系统中的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 混合ML/MM方法为大型异质凝聚相系统提供了有前景的解决方案，但需要进一步加入通用多体校正来处理凝聚相中的多体效应，为未来工作指明了方向。

title: Variance reduction for forces and pressure in variational Monte Carlo
summary: We present simple and practical strategies to reduce the variance of Monte Carlo estimators. Our focus is on variational Monte Carlo calculations of atomic forces and pressure in electronic systems, although we show that the underlying ideas apply more broadly to other observables, like pair-correlation and angular-distribution functions, and other methods, including molecular dynamics. For Pulay-type contributions, we show that a minor modification based on the Metropolis acceptance ratio softens the power-law divergence of the variance to a logarithmic one, and that inexpensive regularizations can further suppress outliers at the price of a controlled small bias. For Hellmann-Feynman forces, we derive compact variance-reduced estimators for periodic systems that are straightforward to implement in standard Monte Carlo codes. The approach is illustrated for high-pressure metallic hydrogen with more than a hundred atoms described by neural quantum states, including an application to molecular dynamics driven by the improved forces.

AI.tldr: 提出简单实用的方差降低策略，专注于变分蒙特卡洛计算中的原子力和压力，通过改进Metropolis接受比和正则化方法减少方差
AI.motivation: 蒙特卡洛估计器在计算原子力和压力时存在高方差问题，特别是Pulay型贡献和Hellmann-Feynman力，需要开发有效的方差降低方法以提高计算效率和精度
AI.method: 1) 对Pulay型贡献，基于Metropolis接受比进行改进，将方差幂律发散软化至对数发散；2) 使用廉价正则化进一步抑制异常值；3) 对Hellmann-Feynman力，推导紧凑的方差降低估计器，适用于周期性系统
AI.result: 方法成功应用于高压金属氢系统（包含超过100个原子），使用神经量子态描述，包括改进力驱动的分子动力学应用，显著降低了方差
AI.conclusion: 提出的方差降低策略简单实用，不仅适用于原子力和压力计算，还可扩展到其他可观测量（如对关联函数、角分布函数）和其他方法（如分子动力学），为大规模量子蒙特卡洛计算提供了有效工具

title: Quench Protection in Insulated REBCO Conductors: Design Optimization and Fast Detection via REBCO SQD
summary: This work was conducted within the framework of the exploratory French project PEPR SupraFusion, which aims to advance the field of fusion energy by developing High-Temperature Superconductor (HTS)-based demonstrators capable of storing significant energy while operating under high magnetic fields and currents. Ensuring a reliable protection during a quench in Insulated REBCO conductors is challenging\,: slow normal-zone propagation and validation delays allow the hotspot's temperature to reach damaging levels. We compare (i) conductor protection via copper-stabilizer optimization and (ii) a co-wound, REBCO superconducting quench detector (SQD) that is electrically isolated yet thermally coupled and intentionally deoxygenated to lower Tc and Ic for an earlier transition. Onedimensional THEA modeling shows that a good choice of stabilizer cross-section makes the protection possible during quench events by keeping the temperature of the hotspot within a safe limit. The simulations also demonstrate that the use of a REBCO SQD enables the quench detection at lower temperatures.

AI.tldr: 比较两种REBCO超导带材失超保护方法：铜稳定层优化和共绕制REBCO失超探测器，通过THEA模拟验证保护效果
AI.motivation: 在法国PEPR SupraFusion项目框架下，针对HTS基聚变能装置中REBCO绝缘导体失超保护难题，由于正常区传播慢和验证延迟导致热点温度可能达到破坏性水平，需要开发可靠的保护方案
AI.method: 使用一维THEA模型比较两种保护策略：(1)优化铜稳定层横截面以改善热扩散；(2)采用共绕制、电隔离但热耦合的REBCO失超探测器，通过故意脱氧降低Tc和Ic以实现更早的失超检测
AI.result: 模拟显示：合适的稳定层横截面选择能在失超事件中通过限制热点温度在安全范围内实现保护；REBCO失超探测器能够在更低的温度下检测到失超
AI.conclusion: 两种方法都能有效改善REBCO绝缘导体的失超保护，铜稳定层优化提供直接的热管理保护，而REBCO失超探测器则通过更早的检测为保护系统提供更长的响应时间

title: Neural network backflow for ab-initio solid calculations
summary: Accurately simulating extended periodic systems is a central challenge in condensed matter physics. Neural quantum states (NQS) offer expressive wavefunctions for this task but face issues with scalability. In this work, we successfully extend the neural network backflow (NNBF) approach to ab-initio solid-state materials. Building on our scalable optimization framework for molecules [Liu et al., PRB 112, 155162 (2025)], we introduce a two-stage pruning strategy to manage the massive configuration space expansions: by utilizing a computationally cheap, physics-informed importance proxy, we devote exact NNBF amplitude evaluations solely to the most relevant determinants, significantly improving optimization efficiency, energy estimation, and convergence. Our framework achieves state-of-the-art accuracy across diverse solid-state benchmarks. For 1D hydrogen chains, NNBF matches or surpasses DMRG and AFQMC, remains robust in strongly correlated bond-breaking regimes where coupled-cluster methods fail, and smoothly extrapolates to the thermodynamic limit. We further demonstrate its scalability by computing ground-state potential energy curves for 2D graphene and 3D silicon. Finally, ablation studies validate the computational savings of our pruning strategy and highlight the dependence of the NNBF energies on basis sets.

AI.tldr: 该论文成功将神经网络回流方法扩展到从头算固态材料，通过两阶段剪枝策略管理巨大的构型空间，在多种固态基准测试中达到最先进精度。
AI.motivation: 准确模拟扩展周期系统是凝聚态物理的核心挑战。神经量子态为此提供了表达性波函数，但面临可扩展性问题。需要将神经网络回流方法扩展到固态材料，并解决构型空间爆炸的问题。
AI.method: 基于分子系统的可扩展优化框架，引入两阶段剪枝策略：利用计算成本低、物理信息丰富的重要性代理，将精确的神经网络回流振幅评估仅分配给最相关的行列式，显著提高优化效率、能量估计和收敛性。
AI.result: 在多种固态基准测试中达到最先进精度：对于1D氢链，神经网络回流匹配或超越DMRG和AFQMC；在强关联键断裂区域保持稳健（耦合簇方法失效）；平滑外推到热力学极限；成功计算2D石墨烯和3D硅的基态势能曲线。
AI.conclusion: 该工作成功将神经网络回流方法扩展到从头算固态材料，通过创新的剪枝策略解决了可扩展性问题，为固态系统的准确量子模拟提供了强大工具，消融研究验证了剪枝策略的计算节省效果，并揭示了神经网络回流能量对基组选择的依赖性。

title: Parity superselection obstructs monogamy of mutual information in free fermions
summary:
We prove that free fermions in the spin (tensor product) factorization violate monogamy of mutual information: $I_3^{\mathrm{spin}} > 0$ for three adjacent strips of width $w = 1, 2$ at all Fermi momenta, and for all~$w$ at $z = k_F w < z^* \approx 1.329$. The proof rests on an exact operator identity -- the fermionic and spin reduced density matrices of disjoint regions differ by the parity insertion $(-1)^{N_B}$ in the partial trace -- and a rigorous entropy bound.
  DMRG calculations on the $t$-$V$ chain quantify the effect for interacting fermions: the factorization contribution to the apparent $K$-dependence of $I_3$ exceeds the genuine interaction contribution by a factor of~8 at moderate filling, and accounts for ${\sim}80\%$ of the deviation observed in spin-basis numerics. Strong repulsion ($K \lesssim 0.7$) restores monogamy in both algebras.
  These results imply that any use of $I_3$ as a diagnostic -- whether for holographic duality, quantum chaos, or Fermi surface topology -- must specify the operator algebra; without this specification, the sign of $I_3$ is ambiguous.

AI.tldr: 自旋基下的自由费米子违反互信息单调性，相互作用费米子中自旋因子化贡献主导I3的K依赖性，强排斥作用恢复单调性
AI.motivation: 研究互信息单调性（I3）在不同算子代数（费米子vs自旋）下的表现差异，澄清I3作为诊断工具（全息对偶、量子混沌、费米面拓扑）时的代数依赖性
AI.method: 1. 理论证明：利用精确算子恒等式（费米子和自旋约化密度矩阵相差宇称算符(-1)^{N_B}）和严格熵界；2. 数值计算：在t-V链上使用DMRG方法研究相互作用费米子
AI.result: 1. 自旋基自由费米子违反互信息单调性（I3>0）；2. 相互作用费米子中，自旋因子化贡献对I3的K依赖性贡献占主导（比相互作用贡献大8倍，占偏差80%）；3. 强排斥作用（K≲0.7）在两个代数中都恢复单调性
AI.conclusion: 使用I3作为诊断工具时必须指定算子代数，否则I3的符号是模糊的；代数选择会影响对全息对偶、量子混沌、费米面拓扑等物理现象的解读

title: Cobalt Binary Compounds for Advanced Interconnect Materials
summary: The industrial standard copper (Cu) interconnects face a substantial resistivity increase at thinner linewidths, posing a well-known challenge to limit overall device performance. To address this issue, we have evaluated the potential properties of cobalt (Co) based binary compounds as replacements for Cu. Co is considered as a promising alternative due to its potential for enhanced reliability and low resistivity at sub-nanoscale dimensions. Furthermore, the combination of elements provides a possibility to engineer novel properties, transcending the limitations of elemental metals and expanding the search space for next-generation interconnects. In this study, a high-throughput screening method was used to identify several Co-based binary compounds with superior electronic transport and reliability at reduced thickness. The findings demonstrate that specific Co-based binary compounds hold significant potential to overcome the performance limitations of scaled interconnects.

AI.tldr: 研究通过高通量筛选发现钴基二元化合物可作为铜互连的替代材料，解决纳米尺度下电阻率急剧增加的问题
AI.motivation: 传统铜互连在更细线宽下电阻率显著增加，限制了器件性能。钴因其在亚纳米尺度下具有低电阻率和增强可靠性的潜力而被视为有希望的替代材料
AI.method: 采用高通量筛选方法，系统评估钴基二元化合物的性能，识别具有优异电子传输和可靠性的候选材料
AI.result: 发现特定钴基二元化合物在减薄厚度下表现出优越的电子传输特性和可靠性，有望克服缩放互连的性能限制
AI.conclusion: 钴基二元化合物具有显著潜力替代铜互连，能够解决纳米尺度下电阻率增加的问题，为下一代互连技术开辟新方向

title: Dissipative Nonlinear Phononics: Nonequilibrium Quasiperiodic Order in Light-Driven Spin-Phonon System
summary: Nonlinear phononics has emerged as a powerful paradigm for the nonthermal control of quantum materials by engineering a conservative potential energy landscape. Here, we show that dissipation can serve as an additional control knob for nonequilibrium states in nonlinear phononics. We reveal a nontrivial role of dissipation by investigating a spin-phonon coupled system driven by circularly polarized light. By tuning the spin relaxation time $τ_s$, the steady state undergoes a transition from a trivial limit cycle to a temporally ordered state, which spontaneously breaks the discrete time-translation symmetry imposed by the drive. In this state, both the spin and phonon angular momentum exhibit persistent oscillations at an emergent frequency $Ω_s$, which is generally incommensurate with the driving frequency. This state is stabilized by a dissipation-induced phase lag between spin and phonon angular momentum that generates a feedback loop sustaining the oscillation. The dissipation-controlled transition can be described within a Landau-type framework using a pseudo-potential, where the order parameter has a $U(1)$ phase symmetry, and its amplitude is proportional to the oscillation amplitude of the phonon angular momentum.

AI.tldr: 非线性声子学中，耗散可作为控制非平衡态的新调控手段，通过调节自旋弛豫时间可实现从平凡极限环到时间有序态的相变，后者自发打破驱动的时间平移对称性。
AI.motivation: 探索耗散在非线性声子学中的非平凡作用，将其作为调控量子材料非平衡态的新控制参数，超越传统的保守势能调控方法。
AI.method: 研究圆偏振光驱动的自旋-声子耦合系统，通过调节自旋弛豫时间τ_s，分析系统稳态行为，采用朗道型框架和赝势理论描述相变。
AI.result: 系统经历从平凡极限环到时间有序态的相变，后者自发打破离散时间平移对称性，自旋和声子角动量在涌现频率Ω_s下持续振荡，耗散诱导的相位滞后形成反馈回路稳定振荡态。
AI.conclusion: 耗散可作为非线性声子学中调控非平衡态的有效控制参数，通过调节弛豫时间可实现时间有序态，为量子材料非平衡控制提供了新途径。

title: Nanoscale mapping of internal magnetization dynamics reveals how disorder shapes heat generation in magnetic particle hyperthermia
summary: Magnetic particle hyperthermia relies on the efficient conversion of magnetic field energy into heat in biomedical applications, yet the microscopic mechanisms governing heat generation within individual particles remain poorly understood. In this study, AC magnetometry experiments are combined with dynamic micromagnetic simulations to connect microstructural features, magnetization dynamics, and macroscopic heat dissipation. Beyond macroscopic heating metrics, the heat generation is resolved at the intra-particle level, uncovering a heterogeneous landscape of localized ''hot spots'' with nanometer spatial and nanosecond temporal resolution. The results demonstrate that grain size acts as a key experimentally tunable parameter, balancing anisotropy disorder and pinning strength, thereby controlling both the magnitude and spatio-temporal distribution of heat release within the particle. In particular, nanoflower architectures composed by larger grains deliver larger heat generation, while the smaller grains offer a deeper intra-particle pinning landscape, which effectively redistributes the heat generation over extended time windows. Together, our results provide a mechanistic framework linking nanoparticle microstructure to magnetic heating and establish design principles for optimizing nanoflowers as magnetic hyperthermia transducers.

AI.tldr: 该研究结合交流磁测量和动态微磁模拟，揭示了磁性纳米粒子在磁热疗中热量产生的微观机制，发现晶粒尺寸是关键可调参数，控制着粒子内部热量释放的时空分布。
AI.motivation: 磁热疗依赖于磁场能量向热量的高效转换，但单个粒子内部热量产生的微观机制尚不清楚，需要建立纳米粒子微观结构与磁热效应之间的关联。
AI.method: 结合交流磁测量实验和动态微磁模拟，在纳米空间尺度和纳秒时间分辨率下分析粒子内部的热量产生分布。
AI.result: 发现粒子内部存在局部"热点"的异质分布，晶粒尺寸是关键参数：大晶粒产生更多热量，小晶粒提供更深的钉扎景观，将热量产生重新分布到更长时间窗口。
AI.conclusion: 建立了连接纳米粒子微观结构与磁热效应的机制框架，为优化纳米花结构作为磁热疗换能器提供了设计原则。

title: Stochastic Collision Theory of Magnetism in Radical Fluids
summary: How stochastic, microscopic events generate deterministic, macroscopic properties is a fundamental question in physics. We address this question by developing a quantum master equation model for concentrated radical solutions, where random molecular collisions govern the magnetic properties of the system. Our theory reveals a simple mechanism: the first-order exchange contribution averages to zero over collisions, while the second-order term survives as an effective ferromagnetic coupling that enhances magnetization. The model captures the experimentally observed trends in magnetic behavior that deviate from conventional theories. Because the mechanism arises from statistical averaging, it may apply to a broader class of soft matter phenomena, including liquid crystals.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了浓自由基溶液的量子主方程模型，揭示了随机分子碰撞如何通过统计平均产生有效铁磁耦合，从而增强磁化强度。
AI.motivation: 研究微观随机事件如何产生宏观确定性性质是物理学的基本问题。本文旨在通过浓自由基溶液系统，探索随机分子碰撞如何支配系统的磁性行为。
AI.method: 开发了浓自由基溶液的量子主方程模型，分析分子碰撞对磁性的影响。理论揭示了碰撞过程中一阶交换贡献平均为零，而二阶项作为有效铁磁耦合存活的机制。
AI.result: 模型成功捕捉了实验中观察到的偏离传统理论的磁性行为趋势。机制表明统计平均产生有效铁磁耦合，增强磁化强度。
AI.conclusion: 由于该机制源于统计平均，可能适用于更广泛的软物质现象，包括液晶等系统，为微观随机性到宏观确定性的转变提供了新见解。

title: Microwave spin resonance in epitaxial thin films of spin liquid candidate TbInO3
summary: Minimizing the energy of a many body system tends to favor order, but classical frustration and quantum fluctuations destabilize that order. The tension between these effects can produce exotic quantum states of matter. Quantum spin liquid (QSL) states emerge in models of localized magnetic moments where the crystal lattice connectivity frustrates ordering, and the exchange interaction of neighboring spins strengthens quantum fluctuations. Experimentally identifying a QSL in a real material is challenging from the lack of an order parameter. Piecing together evidence from varied techniques is necessary for diagnosing the nature of the ground state -- QSL or otherwise -- of a frustrated spin system. In this work, we use coplanar superconducting resonators to probe magnetic excitations in epitaxially grown thin films of a spin liquid candidate TbInO3. Adapting microwave techniques from the field of circuit quantum electrodynamics, we measure responses of these thin films whose volume is too low for applying conventional bulk techniques. In-plane susceptibility extracted from the spin resonance signal indicates extreme frustration of magnetic order down to 20 mK, over two orders of magnitude lower than the Curie-Weiss energy scale. Through a crystal field analysis, we identify the doublet eigenstates comprising the ground state. As a consequence of improper ferroelectricity, Tb moments split into two flavors with distinct g-factors reflecting the local crystal field environment of each site. Spin-orbit coupling, crystal fields, magnetic frustration and improper ferroelectricity distinctively combine to shape the magnetic ground state of TbInO3. This work establishes a measurement technique using superconducting resonators to probe thin films of frustrated magnets, and applies this technique towards building a coherent understanding of the magnetic properties of TbInO3.

AI.tldr: 使用超导谐振器测量自旋液体候选材料TbInO3薄膜的磁激发，发现其磁有序极度受挫，为量子自旋液体研究提供了新测量技术
AI.motivation: 量子自旋液体（QSL）是量子磁性系统中的奇异物态，但实验上很难直接识别，因为缺乏明确的序参量。需要发展新的测量技术来探测受挫磁系统的基态性质，特别是对于薄膜样品，其体积太小无法使用传统体材料测量技术。
AI.method: 采用共面超导谐振器技术，借鉴电路量子电动力学中的微波技术，测量外延生长的TbInO3薄膜的磁激发响应。通过晶体场分析确定基态的双重态本征态，并提取面内磁化率。
AI.result: 测量显示TbInO3的磁有序极度受挫，温度低至20 mK（比居里-外斯能量尺度低两个数量级）。由于非本征铁电性，Tb磁矩分裂为两种具有不同g因子的类型，反映了每个位点的局域晶体场环境。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作建立了使用超导谐振器探测受挫磁体薄膜的测量技术，并将该技术应用于构建对TbInO3磁性的连贯理解。自旋轨道耦合、晶体场、磁受挫和非本征铁电性的独特组合共同塑造了TbInO3的磁基态。

title: First-principles prediction of high-temperature superconductivity in stretched carbon nanotubes
summary: Superconductivity in quasi-one-dimensional systems is an significant but undervalued research field. In this work, based on the electron-phonon coupling mechanism, we systematically investigate the superconductivity in quasi-one-dimensional carbon nanotube under uniaxial tensile strain. The calculated superconducting critical temperature attains its peak value of 162 K at a uniaxial tensile strain of 4.5\%, being drastically higher than the counterpart in the unstrained carbon nanotube. An overall softening of phonons, strong electron-phonon coupling, and an increase of electronic density of states at the Fermi level, play key roles in achieving high-temperature superconductivity in this system. Our research demonstrates that stretching is an effective approach to modulating the superconductivity one-dimensional materials, and more importantly, indicates that high-temperature superconductivity may occur in carbon nanotubes.

AI.tldr: 碳纳米管在4.5%单轴拉伸应变下可实现162K高温超导，远超未应变状态
AI.motivation: 准一维系统的超导性是一个重要但被低估的研究领域，碳纳米管作为典型准一维材料，其超导特性值得深入研究
AI.method: 基于电子-声子耦合机制，系统研究单轴拉伸应变下碳纳米管的超导性，分析声子软化、电子-声子耦合强度和费米能级电子态密度变化
AI.result: 在4.5%单轴拉伸应变下，超导临界温度达到峰值162K，远高于未应变碳纳米管；声子整体软化、强电子-声子耦合和费米能级电子态密度增加是关键因素
AI.conclusion: 拉伸是调控一维材料超导性的有效方法，碳纳米管中可能存在高温超导现象，为碳基高温超导材料研究提供新方向

title: Predicting electron-phonon coupling and electronic transport at the moiré scale in twisted bilayer graphene
summary: First-principles calculations can accurately describe electron-phonon (e-ph) interactions and electronic transport in a wide range of materials, but are currently limited to unit cells with up to $\sim$100 atoms due to computational cost. Here, we develop an atomistic electronic potential with Holstein- and Peierls-like terms for modeling e-ph interactions and phonon-limited electronic transport that enables the study of moiré systems with thousands of atoms per unit cell. This method can accurately reproduce first-principles e-ph coupling and resistivity in graphene and large-angle twisted bilayer graphene (TBG). Using this approach, we study TBG over a range of twist angles down to 1.6$^\circ$ (5044-atom unit cell), and report the evolution of e-ph interactions and phonon-limited resistivity with twist angle. The predicted resistivity increases by two orders of magnitude between 13.2$^\circ$ and 1.6$^\circ$, driven by the progressive reduction of the electronic energy scale. Our calculations can predict key experimental trends in 2.0$^\circ$ and 1.6$^\circ$ TBG, including the resistivity and its dependence on temperature and band filling. Our work establishes a scalable approach for quantitative studies of e-ph interactions and transport in moiré materials and other systems with previously inaccessible length scales.

AI.tldr: 开发了一种可扩展的原子级电子势方法，用于研究莫尔系统中电子-声子相互作用和声子限制的电子输运，能够处理数千原子的大体系。
AI.motivation: 传统第一性原理计算由于计算成本限制，只能处理约100个原子以内的体系，无法研究包含数千原子的莫尔系统（如小角度扭转双层石墨烯）中的电子-声子相互作用和电子输运。
AI.method: 开发了包含Holstein型和Peierls型项的原子级电子势方法，用于模拟电子-声子相互作用和声子限制的电子输运。该方法能够准确再现第一性原理计算的电子-声子耦合和电阻率。
AI.result: 成功应用于扭转角度低至1.6°（5044原子晶胞）的扭转双层石墨烯，发现电阻率随扭转角度减小而显著增加（13.2°到1.6°增加两个数量级），主要原因是电子能量尺度的逐渐降低。预测结果与2.0°和1.6°扭转双层石墨烯的实验趋势一致。
AI.conclusion: 建立了一种可扩展的定量研究方法，可用于研究莫尔材料和其他先前无法处理的长度尺度系统中的电子-声子相互作用和输运性质。

title: Breakdown of Linear Response Induced by Velocity-Dependent Stochastic Resetting
summary: Linear response theory lies at the foundation of transport phenomena, predicting that physical systems respond proportionally to weak external forces. Here we show that this principle can break down in a minimal nonequilibrium setting due to state-dependent stochastic resetting. We consider a driven Langevin particle subject to a resetting mechanism whose rate grows as a power of the particle velocity, motivated by transport processes where faster carriers experience more frequent scattering events. We derive the exact steady-state velocity distribution and establish a moment balance relation that links external driving, viscous dissipation, and resetting-induced dissipation. This relation reveals that the response is controlled by a nonlinear coupling between the velocity and the resetting rate, leading to nonlinear transport. In particular, the mean velocity obeys the exact power law $\langle v\rangle \propto F^{1/(α+1)}$, where $α$ characterizes the velocity dependence of the resetting rate. Our results provide a solvable example in which linear response fails at the level of the leading-order behavior and identify velocity-dependent resetting as a minimal dynamical mechanism for generating nonlinear transport in nonequilibrium steady states.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了速度依赖重置机制如何导致非线性输运现象，打破了线性响应理论在非平衡态下的适用性。
AI.motivation: 线性响应理论是输运现象的基础，预测物理系统对弱外力呈比例响应。本文旨在探索这一原理在非平衡态下可能失效的情况，特别是通过状态依赖的随机重置机制。
AI.method: 考虑一个受驱动的朗之万粒子，其重置速率随粒子速度的幂次增长。推导了精确的稳态速度分布，建立了连接外部驱动、粘性耗散和重置诱导耗散的矩平衡关系。
AI.result: 发现响应由速度与重置速率之间的非线性耦合控制，导致非线性输运。具体地，平均速度服从精确的幂律关系：⟨v⟩ ∝ F^{1/(α+1)}，其中α表征重置速率的速度依赖性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了一个可解析的例子，表明线性响应理论在主导阶行为层面失效，并确定速度依赖重置作为在非平衡稳态中产生非线性输运的最小动力学机制。

title: Giant Full-Space Anomalous Hall Effect Induced by Non-Coplanar Spin State in Mn-Rich Mn3Sn
summary: Antiferromagnets are promising candidates for next-generation spintronic devices owing to their negligible stray fields and ultrafast spin dynamics. The noncollinear antiferromagnet $\mathrm{Mn}_{3}\mathrm{Sn}$ exhibits a large anomalous Hall effect (AHE). However, its specific noncollinear spin configuration leads to the forbiddance of the anomalous Hall conductivity from the (0001) basal plane, $σ_{(0001)}$, limiting practical applications. Here, using first-principles density functional theory, we demonstrate that Mn enrichment in $\mathrm{Mn}_{3}\mathrm{Sn}$ drives a magnetic transition from the coplanar $120^\circ$ spin configuration to a non-coplanar state with moments tilted toward the $c$-axis. This transition is primarily mediated by four-spin ring exchange interaction in the local triangular lattice, which breaks the time-reversal symmetry and generates a giant intrinsic anomalous Hall conductivity over the full three-dimensional space in $\mathrm{Mn}_{3}\mathrm{Sn}$. We predict that $σ_{(0001)}$ reaches as high as $\sim\!-468~Ω^{-1}\cdot\mathrm{cm}^{-1}$, and an enhanced $σ_{(01\bar{1}0)}$ of $\sim\!-229~Ω^{-1}\cdot\mathrm{cm}^{-1}$ is expected in light Mn self-doping of $\mathrm{Mn}_{3}\mathrm{Sn}$ ($\mathrm{Mn}_{3.125}\mathrm{Sn}_{0.875}$). Unlike previously reported mechanisms relying on external magnetic fields or strain, our approach exploits intrinsic compositional tuning to stabilize a non-coplanar magnetic ground state for realizing a strong full-space AHE in antiferromagnets, providing another viable pathway toward high-performance, low-power spintronic devices.

AI.tldr: Mn富集使Mn₃Sn从共面120°自旋构型转变为非共面态，通过四自旋环交换相互作用打破时间反演对称性，实现全三维空间的巨大反常霍尔效应
AI.motivation: Mn₃Sn作为非共线反铁磁体具有大的反常霍尔效应，但其特定的自旋构型禁止了(0001)基面的反常霍尔电导，限制了实际应用
AI.method: 使用第一性原理密度泛函理论计算，研究Mn富集对Mn₃Sn磁性的影响，分析四自旋环交换相互作用在磁相变中的作用
AI.result: Mn富集驱动磁相变：从共面120°自旋构型转变为自旋向c轴倾斜的非共面态，预测(0001)面反常霍尔电导高达-468 Ω⁻¹·cm⁻¹，(01-10)面为-229 Ω⁻¹·cm⁻¹
AI.conclusion: 通过内在成分调控稳定非共面磁基态，实现反铁磁体中强大的全空间反常霍尔效应，为高性能、低功耗自旋电子器件提供了新途径

title: Quantifying quasiparticle chirality in a chiral topological semimetal
summary: Recently, the projection of the electron's spin on its crystal momentum has been proposed as a metric to quantify electronic chirality of Bloch states in crystals, which is expected to affect a wide range of physical properties, such as magnetoelectric and optical responses. However, a direct experimental quantification of this chirality metric over an entire iso-energy surface has remained elusive. Here, we have used spin- and angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy to directly probe the electronic chirality by measuring the bulk spin texture of Kramers-Weyl and Weyl cones in RhSi, a chiral topological semimetal with strong spin-orbit coupling (SOC). After quantifying the SOC splitting of Weyl cones, we determine their spin direction along different azimuthal angles to extract energy dependent the deviations (up to ~40°) from perfect parallel spin-momentum locking. From these deviations we define an energy-dependent normalized electron chirality density (NECD), a directly accessible metric of bulk electronic chirality. In RhSi, the NECD decreases from 1 at the Kramers-Weyl point to ~0.8 at ~200 meV below it. Finally, we show that this experimentally grounded NECD provides predictive power for magneto-optical and transport responses of chiral materials, exemplified by the longitudinal Edelstein effect.

AI.tldr: 利用自旋角分辨光电子能谱直接测量手性拓扑半金属RhSi中Kramers-Weyl和Weyl锥的体自旋织构，定义了可直接测量的体电子手性度量NECD，并展示其在预测磁光和输运响应中的应用。
AI.motivation: 电子自旋在晶体动量上的投影被提出作为量化晶体中布洛赫态电子手性的度量，但直接实验测量整个等能面上的手性度量一直难以实现。
AI.method: 使用自旋和角分辨光电子能谱直接探测RhSi（一种具有强自旋轨道耦合的手性拓扑半金属）中Kramers-Weyl和Weyl锥的体自旋织构，测量自旋方向沿不同方位角的变化，提取与完美平行自旋-动量锁定的偏差。
AI.result: 量化了Weyl锥的自旋轨道耦合分裂，确定了能量依赖的自旋-动量锁定偏差（高达~40°），定义了能量依赖的归一化电子手性密度（NECD）。在RhSi中，NECD从Kramers-Weyl点的1下降到其下方~200 meV处的~0.8。
AI.conclusion: 实验确定的NECD为手性材料的磁光和输运响应提供了预测能力，如纵向Edelstein效应，实现了对体电子手性的直接实验量化。

title: Design Space of Self--Consistent Electrostatic Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials
summary: Machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) have become widely used tools in atomistic simulations. For much of the history of this field, the most commonly employed architectures were based on short-ranged atomic energy contributions, and the assumption of locality still persists in many modern foundation models. While this approach has enabled efficient and accurate modelling for many use cases, it poses intrinsic limitations for systems where long-range electrostatics, charge transfer, or induced polarization play a central role. A growing body of work has proposed extensions that incorporate electrostatic effects, ranging from locally predicted atomic charges to self-consistent models. While these models have demonstrated success for specific examples, their underlying assumptions, and fundamental limitations are not yet well understood. In this work, we present a framework for treating electrostatics in MLIPs by viewing existing models as coarse-grained approximations to density functional theory (DFT). This perspective makes explicit the approximations involved, clarifies the physical meaning of the learned quantities, and reveals connections and equivalences between several previously proposed models. Using this formalism, we identify key design choices that define a broader design space of self-consistent electrostatic MLIPs. We implement salient points in this space using the MACE architecture and a shared representation of the charge density, enabling controlled comparisons between different approaches. Finally, we evaluate these models on two instructive test cases: metal-water interfaces, which probe the contrasting electrostatic response of conducting and insulating systems, and charged vacancies in silicon dioxide. Our results highlight the limitations of existing approaches and demonstrate how more expressive self-consistent models are needed to resolve failures.

AI.tldr: 论文提出一个将机器学习原子间势中的静电处理视为密度泛函理论粗粒化近似的框架，揭示了现有模型的局限性，并通过MACE架构实现不同方法的对比验证。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习原子间势基于短程原子能量贡献和局域性假设，在处理长程静电、电荷转移或诱导极化起关键作用的系统时存在内在局限性。虽然已有扩展模型纳入静电效应，但其基本假设和局限性尚未被充分理解。
AI.method: 提出一个理论框架，将现有静电MLIP模型视为密度泛函理论的粗粒化近似，明确其中的近似假设，阐明学习量的物理意义。使用MACE架构和共享电荷密度表示实现不同方法，在金属-水界面和二氧化硅带电空位两个测试案例上进行评估。
AI.result: 研究结果突显了现有方法的局限性，表明需要更具表达力的自洽模型来解决现有模型的失败案例。通过对比不同方法，揭示了设计自洽静电MLIP的关键选择。
AI.conclusion: 将静电MLIP视为DFT粗粒化近似的视角有助于理解现有模型的假设和局限性，为设计更有效的自洽静电模型提供了理论框架和设计空间，推动了该领域的发展。

title: Synergistic doping and stabilization of magnetically tunable LnTi$_3$(Sb,Sn)$_4$ (Ln:Ce--Gd) kagome metals
summary: Here we present our synthesis and characterization of the LnTi$_3$(Sb,Sn)$_4$ (Ln: Ce, Pr, Nd, Sm, Gd) family of cleavable kagome metals. While these materials are isostructural to the LnTi$_3$Bi$_4$ family, they only form as (Sb,Sn) solid-solutions with no corresponding LnTi$_3$Sb$_4$ or LnTi$_3$Sn$_4$ phases. We use a combination of first-principles density functional theory (DFT) and Crystal Orbital Hamilton Population (COHP) calculations to show that (Sb,Sn) alloying has a stabilizing effect on the structure by adjusting the Fermi level, filling bonding states, depopulating antibonding states, and adjusting the density-of-states (DOS) towards local minima, an effect we call ``synergistic doping.'' The tunable Fermi level also has a profound effect on the magnetism, which we demonstrate through a detailed characterization of the SmTi$_3$(Sb,Sn)$_4$ series. The series hosts multiple magnetic ground states resulting from competing magnetic interactions that are tunable by the (Sb,Sn) ratio. While the focus of this work is on SmTi$_3$(Sb,Sn)$_4$, we briefly comment on the (Sb,Sn) solubility range and the conferred magnetic tunability in the other rare-earths compounds (Ln: Ce, Pr, Nd, Gd) as well. Our work demonstrates how the (Sb,Sn) synergistic pair can be used to stabilize the LnTi$_3$(Sb,Sn)$_4$ structure while simultaneously providing a means to tune the magnetism, ultimately providing a potential route to develop new intermetallics with chemical, magnetic, and electronic tunability.

AI.tldr: 本文合成了LnTi₃(Sb,Sn)₄系列可剥离的Kagome金属材料，通过(Sb,Sn)固溶体合金化实现结构稳定和磁性调控，提出了"协同掺杂"概念。
AI.motivation: 研究LnTi₃(Sb,Sn)₄系列材料的合成与性质，探索(Sb,Sn)固溶体合金化对结构稳定性和磁性的调控机制，为开发具有化学、磁性和电子可调性的新型金属间化合物提供途径。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理密度泛函理论(DFT)和晶体轨道哈密顿布居(COHP)计算，结合材料合成与表征，重点研究了SmTi₃(Sb,Sn)₄系列，并分析了其他稀土元素(Ce, Pr, Nd, Gd)化合物的(Sb,Sn)固溶范围和磁性可调性。
AI.result: (Sb,Sn)合金化通过调节费米能级、填充成键态、减少反键态占据以及将态密度调整到局部最小值来稳定结构，这种效应被称为"协同掺杂"。可调的费米能级对磁性有显著影响，SmTi₃(Sb,Sn)₄系列表现出多种由竞争磁相互作用产生的磁基态，这些基态可通过(Sb,Sn)比例进行调控。
AI.conclusion: (Sb,Sn)协同对可用于稳定LnTi₃(Sb,Sn)₄结构，同时提供调控磁性的手段，为开发具有化学、磁性和电子可调性的新型金属间化合物提供了潜在途径。

title: Effect of pulse duration on current-induced selective oxygen migration in high-Tc superconductors
summary: High current densities can induce the directional diffusion of atoms in metallic films. In YBa$_2$Cu$_3$O$_{7-δ}$ (YBCO), this electromigration process selectively acts on oxygen atoms lying in the Cu-O chains, permitting to vary the oxygen concentration in a targeted spot of high current density. This approach has proven successful in mapping the phase diagram of the material as a function of carrier concentration or as a way to manufacture memristive devices owing to its reversibility under small bipolar excitations. Thus far, most of the investigations have been limited to pulsed excitation with current/voltage pulses on a millisecond or longer scale, for which thermal effects undeniably influence the process. In the present work, we explore the impact of pulse length $δt$ on the onset current of electromigration, $I_{\text{EM}}$, of YBCO bridges, covering the range from 200 ns to 1 ms. As $δt$ decreases below $\sim 10~μ$s, $I_{\text{EM}}$ exhibits a rapid increase. Analytical and numerical estimates of the local temperature show that as pulses shorten, the temperature decreases, making the electromigration process more athermal. These findings are relevant for the operation of memristors and should be taken into account when describing the effects of thermomagnetic instabilities in thin films.

AI.tldr: 研究YBCO薄膜中电迁移过程的脉冲宽度依赖性，发现当脉冲宽度低于10μs时，电迁移起始电流显著增加，表明过程变得更加非热主导
AI.motivation: 先前研究主要限于毫秒级或更长的脉冲激发，热效应显著影响电迁移过程。本研究旨在探索脉冲宽度对YBCO电迁移起始电流的影响，特别是在更短时间尺度下的行为
AI.method: 通过实验测量YBCO桥结构在不同脉冲宽度（200ns至1ms）下的电迁移起始电流I_EM，结合分析和数值方法估算局部温度变化
AI.result: 当脉冲宽度δt低于约10μs时，I_EM迅速增加。温度估算表明，随着脉冲缩短，局部温度降低，电迁移过程变得更加非热主导
AI.conclusion: 短脉冲下电迁移的非热特性增强，这对忆阻器操作和薄膜中热磁不稳定性的描述具有重要意义

title: Loss of altermagnetic order and smooth restoration of Kramers' spin degeneracy with increasing temperature in CrSb and MnTe
summary: We describe how thermally induced spin fluctuations modify the electronic structures of two prototypical altermagnets, CrSb and MnTe, via application of the disordered local moment picture. For both materials, our self-consistent, ab initio calculations demonstrate that local magnetic moments persist on Cr and Mn atoms in their paramagnetic states, necessitating a spin-polarised description of the electronic structure even above the Néel temperature, $T_\mathrm{N}$. Moreover, Kramers' spin degeneracy, which is broken for both materials in their altermagnetic ground states, is shown to be smoothly restored - on the average - as the local moments thermally disorder. In metallic CrSb, this occurs at temperatures well below $T_\mathrm{N}$ and the signature effects of its altermagnetism are lost as the magnetic disorder induces heavy smearing of strongly dispersive electronic states around the Fermi energy. By contrast, in semiconducting MnTe, with its band gap largely unaffected by magnetic disorder, the spin degeneracy only returns at temperatures close to and above $T_\mathrm{N}$. We quantify the temperature dependence of the altermagnetic order parameter and the underlying electronic structures of both materials, with significant implications for their spin transport properties.

AI.tldr: 热诱导自旋涨落通过无序局域矩方法改变CrSb和MnTe两种典型交变磁体的电子结构，揭示即使在奈尔温度以上仍需自旋极化描述，且Kramers自旋简并随温度升高逐渐恢复。
AI.motivation: 研究交变磁体在热激发下的电子结构变化，特别是自旋涨落如何影响Kramers自旋简并的恢复过程，这对于理解交变磁体的自旋输运性质具有重要意义。
AI.method: 采用无序局域矩图像进行自洽第一性原理计算，分析CrSb和MnTe两种典型交变磁体在热激发下的电子结构变化，量化温度依赖的交变磁序参数。
AI.result: 1) Cr和Mn原子在顺磁态仍保持局域磁矩，即使在奈尔温度以上仍需自旋极化描述；2) Kramers自旋简并随热无序平滑恢复；3) 金属性CrSb在远低于TN时失去交变磁特征，而半导体MnTe的带隙基本不受影响，自旋简并仅在接近TN时恢复。
AI.conclusion: 热诱导自旋涨落显著改变交变磁体的电子结构，金属性和半导体交变磁体表现出不同的温度响应行为，这对它们的自旋输运性质有重要影响。

title: Coarsening in the long-range Persistent Voter Model
summary: We investigate the coarsening kinetics in a long-range variant of the Persistent Voter Model in space dimension $d=1$ and 2. In this model agents can hold two confidence levels, normal and zealot. If normal, agents take the opinion of others chosen at distance $r$ with probability $P(r) \propto r^{-α}$, with $α>d$. While in the zealot state, agents keep their own opinion. Normal (zealot) agents can become zealots (normal) if their opinion is equal (different) to that of the chosen neighbour. Through numerical simulations we show that, for any values of $α$, the model belongs to the same universality class of the long-range Ising model quenched to a small (non-zero) temperature, similarly to what was already known for the nearest-neighbor case. For the one-dimensional case, we further develop an analytical treatment, which reproduces the $α$-dependence of the correlation length and the functional form of the correlation function. These results not only confirm that the introduction of opinion inertia mitigates the strong interfacial noise present in the voter model, thus reinstating the basic kinetic mechanism of the Ising model, but also expand the applicability of this correspondence.

AI.tldr: 研究长程持续选民模型在1维和2维空间中的粗化动力学，发现该模型与长程伊辛模型属于同一普适类，证实了意见惯性可以减轻选民模型中的界面噪声。
AI.motivation: 研究具有长程相互作用的持续选民模型的粗化动力学，探索意见惯性如何影响系统的动力学行为，并验证该模型与伊辛模型的普适类对应关系是否在长程相互作用下仍然成立。
AI.method: 通过数值模拟研究1维和2维系统，其中智能体具有正常和狂热两种置信水平。正常智能体以概率P(r)∝r^{-α}选择距离r的邻居意见，而狂热智能体保持自己意见。同时开发了1维情况的解析处理方法。
AI.result: 对于所有α值，该模型与淬火到非零温度的长程伊辛模型属于同一普适类。解析处理成功重现了相关长度的α依赖性和相关函数的函数形式。
AI.conclusion: 意见惯性的引入减轻了选民模型中的强界面噪声，恢复了伊辛模型的基本动力学机制，扩展了这种对应关系的适用范围。

title: Research Paradigm of Materials Science Tetrahedra with Artificial Intelligence
summary: The classical material tetrahedron that represents the Structure-Property-Processing-Performance-Characterization relationship is the most important research paradigm in materials science so far. It has served as a protocol to guide experiments, modeling, and theory to uncover hidden relationships between various aspects of a certain material. This substantially facilitates knowledge accumulation and material discovery with desired functionalities to realize versatile applications. In recent years, with the advent of artificial intelligence (AI) techniques, the attention of AI towards scientific research is soaring. The trials of implementing AI in various disciplines are endless, with great potential to revolutionize the research diagram. Despite the success in natural language processing and computer vision, how to effectively integrate AI with natural science is still a grand challenge, bearing in mind their fundamental differences. Inspired by these observations and limitations, we delve into the current research paradigm dictated by the classical material tetrahedron and propose two new paradigms to stimulate data-driven and AI-augmented research. One tetrahedron focuses on AI for materials science by considering the Matter-Data-Model-Potential-Agent diagram. The other demonstrates AI research by discussing Data-Architecture-Encoding-Optimization-Inference relationships. The crucial ingredients of these frameworks and their connections are discussed, which will likely motivate both scientific thinking refinement and technology advancement. Despite the widespread enthusiasm for chasing AI for science, we must analyze issues rationally to come up with well-defined, resolvable scientific problems in order to better master the power of AI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两个新范式来推动数据驱动和AI增强的材料科学研究：一个关注AI在材料科学中的应用（物质-数据-模型-潜力-智能体），另一个展示AI研究本身（数据-架构-编码-优化-推理）。
AI.motivation: 传统材料四面体（结构-性能-加工-性能-表征）是材料科学的重要研究范式，但AI技术与自然科学融合仍面临挑战。需要新的研究范式来促进数据驱动和AI增强的材料科学研究。
AI.method: 分析当前由传统材料四面体主导的研究范式，提出两个新范式：1）AI用于材料科学的"物质-数据-模型-潜力-智能体"四面体；2）AI研究的"数据-架构-编码-优化-推理"关系框架。
AI.result: 建立了两个新的研究框架，讨论了这些框架的关键要素及其相互联系，为科学思维精炼和技术进步提供动力。
AI.conclusion: 尽管AI for Science备受关注，但需要理性分析问题，提出明确定义、可解决的科学问题，以更好地掌握AI的力量。新范式将促进数据驱动和AI增强的材料科学研究。

title: Composite boson theory of Hall crystals and their transitions to Wigner crystals
summary: We consider the crystallization of a two-dimensional electron system in a perpendicular magnetic field using composite boson theory. There are three possible states to consider: the Hall liquid, the Wigner crystal, and the Hall crystal (a state with both broken translation symmetry and a quantized Hall response). Within composite boson theory, these states map onto a superconductor, a Mott insulator, and a supersolid of composite bosons respectively. We show that when a $ν= 1$ Hall liquid has a sufficiently soft roton, there is a first order transition to a triangular lattice Hall crystal. If we continue to decrease the roton mass, there is a continuous transition from the Hall crystal to a Wigner crystal. {When the Hall crystal exhibits the integer quantum Hall effect,} this transition {is} described by a free Dirac fermion and, at the critical point, the coupling to the phonons of the crystal is irrelevant, {in the {renormalization group} sense}. We extend this analysis to fractional $ν= 1/m$ Hall liquids. There, due to kinetic frustration arising from flux attachment, honeycomb lattice Hall crystals are preferred over triangular ones at intermediate interaction strength.

AI.tldr: 二维电子系统在垂直磁场中结晶的相变研究，通过复合玻色子理论分析霍尔液体、维格纳晶体和霍尔晶体三种状态及其相变
AI.motivation: 研究二维电子系统在垂直磁场中的结晶现象，探索不同量子态之间的相变机制，特别是霍尔液体、维格纳晶体和霍尔晶体之间的转变
AI.method: 使用复合玻色子理论，将电子系统映射到复合玻色子系统：霍尔液体对应超导体，维格纳晶体对应莫特绝缘体，霍尔晶体对应超固态。分析软转子质量变化对相变的影响
AI.result: 当ν=1霍尔液体转子足够软时，存在一阶相变到三角晶格霍尔晶体；进一步降低转子质量时，霍尔晶体到维格纳晶体存在连续相变。对于ν=1/m分数霍尔液体，由于通量附着引起的动力学阻挫，在中等相互作用强度下更倾向于形成六角晶格霍尔晶体
AI.conclusion: 复合玻色子理论为理解二维电子系统在磁场中的结晶相变提供了统一框架，揭示了不同量子态之间的转变机制和晶格结构偏好

title: Reproducible Orchestration of Best Practices for Reaction Path Optimization with the Nudged Elastic Band
summary: The nudged elastic band (NEB) method is the standard approach for finding minimum energy paths and transition states on potential energy surfaces. Practical NEB calculations require several pre-processing steps: endpoint minimization, structural alignment, and initial path generation. These steps are typically handled by ad-hoc scripts or manual intervention, introducing errors and hindering reproducibility. We present a fully automated, open-source Snakemake workflow for small gas phase molecules that couples modern machine learning potentials (PET-MAD) to the eOn saddle point search software. Each step of the calculation lifecycle is encoded as an explicit dependency graph, from model retrieval and endpoint preparation through path initialization and band optimization. The workflow resolves all software dependencies from conda-forge, ensuring identical execution across platforms. Validation on the HCN to HNC isomerization demonstrates that the automated pipeline recovers the known single-barrier energy profile and product energy without manual intervention.

AI.tldr: 开发了一个完全自动化的Snakemake工作流，用于小分子气相反应的NEB计算，消除了传统方法中需要手动干预的预处理步骤，提高了计算的可重复性和准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统的NEB计算需要多个预处理步骤（端点最小化、结构对齐、初始路径生成），这些步骤通常通过临时脚本或手动处理完成，容易引入错误并阻碍可重复性。需要一个完全自动化的解决方案来标准化这一过程。
AI.method: 开发了一个基于Snakemake的自动化工作流，将现代机器学习势能（PET-MAD）与eOn鞍点搜索软件耦合。工作流将计算生命周期的每一步编码为显式依赖图，从模型检索、端点准备到路径初始化和带优化。所有软件依赖都通过conda-forge解析，确保跨平台执行一致性。
AI.result: 在HCN到HNC异构化反应上的验证表明，自动化流程无需人工干预就能恢复已知的单势垒能量剖面和产物能量，证明了工作流的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自动化Snakemake工作流成功解决了NEB计算中预处理步骤的手动依赖问题，提高了计算的可重复性和准确性，为小分子气相反应的能量路径搜索提供了标准化解决方案。

title: Evidence for ferroaxial order in 1T-TiSe$_2$ via elastoresistivity measurements
summary: The study of spontaneous symmetry breaking and electronic order is fundamental in condensed matter physics. Hidden order, symmetry-breaking states that elude conventional probes, potentially plays a crucial role in understanding complex quantum phases in a wide range of materials. Ferroaxial order, a state characterized by broken mirror symmetries while maintaining time-reversal and inversion symmetries, is one of the hidden orders that have proven most challenging to detect experimentally. Here, we demonstrate a new approach for investigating both the ferroaxial order parameter and ferroaxial susceptibility using elastoresistivity measurements. We do this for 1T-TiSe$_{2}$, a material that exhibits charge density wave order that has eluded comprehensive understanding for a long time. These measurements reveal an anomalous off-diagonal linear elastoresistivity in the CDW state. We discuss why this provides a smoking gun for ferroaxial order. Furthermore, we construct an appropriate combination of the symmetry-breaking strains $ε_{x^2-y^2}$ and $ε_{xy}$ that acts as an effective conjugate field for the ferroaxial order, and demonstrate how sweeping this effective field in the CDW state results in a hysteretic behavior of the elastoresistivity, associated with the movement of ferroaxial domain walls. Finally, we reveal a divergence of certain nonlinear elastoresistivity coefficients above the critical temperature, and discuss how this is consistent with a divergence of the ferroaxial susceptibility near T$_{\rm{CDW}}$ $\sim$ 200K. Our study also includes detailed elastocaloric measurements, which reveal the presence of an additional phase transition several tens of Kelvin below T$_{\rm{CDW}}$. Our results provide new insight into the symmetry of the ordered state in 1T-TiSe$_2$ and establish elastoresistivity as a powerful probe of hidden order and its symmetry.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过弹阻测量探测1T-TiSe₂中的铁轴序，发现CDW态中的异常非对角线性弹阻响应，构建了铁轴序的有效共轭场，并揭示了铁轴磁化率在临界温度附近的发散行为。
AI.motivation: 铁轴序作为一种隐藏序（破坏镜面对称但保持时间反演和空间反演对称性）在实验上极难探测，而1T-TiSe₂中的电荷密度波序长期以来未能得到全面理解。研究旨在开发新的实验方法来探测铁轴序及其磁化率。
AI.method: 采用弹阻测量技术，研究1T-TiSe₂在CDW态中的弹阻响应。构建对称性破缺应变ε_{x²-y²}和ε_{xy}的适当组合作为铁轴序的有效共轭场，并通过扫描该有效场观察弹阻的滞后行为。同时进行详细的弹热测量。
AI.result: 1. 在CDW态中观察到异常的非对角线性弹阻响应，这是铁轴序的直接证据；2. 扫描有效共轭场时观察到弹阻的滞后行为，与铁轴畴壁运动相关；3. 某些非线性弹阻系数在临界温度以上发散，表明铁轴磁化率在T_CDW~200K附近发散；4. 弹热测量揭示在T_CDW以下数十开尔文处存在额外的相变。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为1T-TiSe₂有序态的对称性提供了新见解，并确立了弹阻测量作为探测隐藏序及其对称性的强大工具。研究不仅揭示了1T-TiSe₂中的铁轴序特征，还为研究其他材料中的隐藏序提供了新方法。

title: UniMatSim: A High-Throughput Materials Simulation Automation Framework Based on Universal Machine Learning Potentials
comment: 14 pages main text, 17 pages Supporting Information, 4 figures
summary: Universal machine learning interatomic potentials (UMLIPs) offer accuracy close to first-principles calculations at a fraction of the cost, showing significant potential for large-scale material simulations. However, the fragmented UMLIPs ecosystem lacks unified interface standards and integration frameworks, hindering their automated deployment in high-throughput workflows. To address this, we present UniMatSim, a modular Python framework. It systematically integrates various UMLIPs (e.g., CHGNet, M3GNet, MACE) and automates workflows from structural optimization to stability verification. The framework enables seamless model switching via abstracted interfaces, incorporates task orchestration, and provides standardized modules for key properties (elasticity, phonons, molecular dynamics), including automated handling for low-dimensional materials. As a test case, using the 2D Lieb lattice system, we constructed a multi-stage high-throughput screening workflow covering structural optimization, elastic stability, and phonon spectrum calculations. Starting from 1,176 candidate compositions, a four-model consensus pipeline yields 393 stable structures. These are refined by magnetic-state screening and DFT band-structure calculations to 59 Lieb-lattice candidates with staggered-magnetic-band characteristics. Results show UniMatSim significantly improves computational efficiency and reproducibility, providing a reliable infrastructure for data-driven materials discovery and design.

AI.tldr: UniMatSim是一个模块化Python框架，用于统一集成多种通用机器学习原子间势能模型，实现从结构优化到稳定性验证的自动化高通量材料筛选工作流。
AI.motivation: 当前通用机器学习原子间势能模型生态系统碎片化，缺乏统一接口标准和集成框架，阻碍了其在自动化高通量工作流中的部署应用。
AI.method: 开发UniMatSim框架，通过抽象接口集成多种UMLIPs（如CHGNet、M3GNet、MACE），实现模型无缝切换，包含任务编排和标准化模块（弹性、声子、分子动力学），支持低维材料自动处理。
AI.result: 使用2D Lieb晶格系统测试，从1,176个候选组成中，通过四模型共识管道筛选出393个稳定结构，进一步经磁态筛选和DFT能带计算得到59个具有交错磁带特性的Lieb晶格候选材料。
AI.conclusion: UniMatSim显著提高了计算效率和可重复性，为数据驱动的材料发现和设计提供了可靠的基础设施。

title: Discrete Time Crystal Order in Spin-Chains Enabled by Floquet Flat-Bands
comment: Comments and feedback are warmly welcomed
summary: We propose a novel protocol to realize discrete time-crystal (DTC) order in clean, periodically driven spin-$1/2$ chains. In each drive cycle, a global spin flip is followed by a two-tone flat-band segment. This flat-band segment engineers a fully degenerate Floquet quasienergy spectrum, suppresses thermalization, and stabilizes a robust period-doubled subharmonic response. Using exact time evolution, we identify a pronounced subharmonic peak at half the drive frequency in the Fourier spectrum of the order parameter, thereby providing clear evidence for the emergence of stable DTC. The resulting phase is insensitive to system size, interaction strength, and interaction range; however, it remains sensitive to spin-rotation errors ($\varepsilon_r$), which can destabilize the subharmonic response. Compared with disorder-induced many-body localized (MBL) and disorder-free dynamically many-body localized (DMBL) DTCs, we find that the exact flat-band protocol offers a broader tunability of drive parameters, whereas MBL and DMBL based DTCs are more resistant to $\varepsilon_r$. In particular, the $\varepsilon_r$ sensitivity can be suppressed by incorporating additional spin-spin interactions that have modest deviations from the ideal flat-band protocol. This manifests itself in a robust DTC response over a finite window of spin-coupling strengths and drive frequencies. Our results establish flat-band driving as a versatile and experimentally relevant route to DTC order in disorder-free spin systems and motivate further exploration of non-equilibrium phases.

AI.tldr: 提出利用平带驱动在无无序自旋链中实现离散时间晶体，通过全局自旋翻转和平带段工程实现稳定周期倍频响应
AI.motivation: 传统时间晶体通常依赖无序诱导的MBL或DMBL，本文探索在清洁、无无序系统中实现时间晶体的新途径
AI.method: 每个驱动周期包含全局自旋翻转和双音平带段，平带段工程实现完全简并Floquet准能谱，抑制热化
AI.result: 观察到明显的半驱动频率次谐波峰，证明稳定DTC存在；相位对系统尺寸、相互作用强度和范围不敏感，但对自旋旋转误差敏感
AI.conclusion: 平带驱动为无无序自旋系统实现DTC提供了通用且实验相关的途径，可通过额外自旋-自旋相互作用增强对旋转误差的鲁棒性

title: Nitrogen-Vacancy-Mediated Magnetism in Sputtered GdN Thin Films
summary: Among rare-earth nitrides (RENs), gadolinium nitride (GdN) stands out as a promising material for spintronics owing to its distinctive combination of semiconducting behavior, strong exchange interactions, and intrinsically soft ferromagnetism. Its relatively high Curie temperature and large saturation magnetization make it an attractive candidate for device concepts such as non-volatile memory elements and spin-based transistors, motivating efforts toward low-cost, uniform, and compositionally controlled thin-film growth. In this work, we deposited GdN thin films on SiO2/AlN substrates using DC sputtering under reactive nitridation conditions, with thicknesses varying from 18 to 180 nm, and systematically investigated their structural and magnetic properties. The films exhibit soft ferromagnetic ordering, characterized by a coercive field of approximately 200 Oe and a Curie temperature (Tc) near 70 K. Structural analysis reveals lattice distortions and local strain associated with nitrogen-vacancy defects, whose concentration varies with film thickness. Our theoretical studies establish a direct correlation between the observed Raman modes of the GdN lattice and the reduced magnetization induced by nitrogen vacancies. These vacancies give rise to defect-mediated ferromagnetism, leading to a measurable enhancement of Tc from 68 K to 82 K across the studied thickness range. The observed magnetic behavior is well described by the bound magnetic polaron (BMP) model, confirming that nitrogen vacancies are key contributors to ferromagnetic ordering while preserving the soft-magnetic character intrinsic to GdN. This study underscores the pivotal role of defect engineering in optimizing GdN thin films for spintronics applications.

AI.tldr: 通过DC溅射在SiO2/AlN衬底上生长GdN薄膜，研究发现氮空位缺陷通过束缚磁极化子机制增强铁磁性，使居里温度从68K提升至82K，为自旋电子学应用提供了缺陷工程优化策略。
AI.motivation: GdN因其半导体行为、强交换相互作用和软铁磁性而成为自旋电子学有前景的材料，但需要低成本、均匀且成分可控的薄膜生长方法以实现器件应用。
AI.method: 采用DC溅射在SiO2/AlN衬底上沉积厚度18-180 nm的GdN薄膜，在反应性氮化条件下生长，系统研究其结构和磁性能，结合理论分析建立拉曼模式与氮空位诱导磁化降低的关联。
AI.result: 薄膜表现出软铁磁有序，矫顽场约200 Oe，居里温度约70 K；氮空位浓度随厚度变化，缺陷介导的铁磁性使Tc从68K提升至82K；磁行为符合束缚磁极化子模型。
AI.conclusion: 氮空位是GdN铁磁有序的关键贡献者，同时保持其软磁特性；缺陷工程在优化GdN薄膜自旋电子学应用中起关键作用。

title: Spatiotemporal Magnonic Vortex Beams with Alternating Transverse Orbital Angular Momentum
summary: Recent theoretical and experimental studies revealed spatiotemporal photonic, and acoustic, vortex beams in open space. The spatiotemporal vortex beams carry orbital angular momentum perpendicular to the wave propagation direction. Here, we report spatiotemporal magnonic vortex beams in a confined geometry of a ferromagnetic nanostrip. The spatiotemporal magnonic vortex beam contains immobile phase dislocations and the wave propagates in a zigzag-like route. It is remarkable that the transverse orbital angular momentums, carried by the phase dislocations, are spatially alternating. Our findings are in sharp contrast to the photonic and acoustic counterparts, and open a new area in the study of spatiotemporal vortex beams.

AI.tldr: 在铁磁纳米带中发现了时空磁振子涡旋光束，其相位缺陷固定不动，波以锯齿状路径传播，横向轨道角动量在空间上交替变化，与光子和声子对应物形成鲜明对比。
AI.motivation: 先前研究揭示了开放空间中时空光子和声子涡旋光束的存在，这些光束携带垂直于波传播方向的轨道角动量。本研究旨在探索在受限几何结构中是否也存在类似的时空涡旋现象，特别是在磁振子系统中的表现。
AI.method: 在铁磁纳米带的受限几何结构中研究磁振子波的行为，通过实验和理论分析观察时空磁振子涡旋光束的形成和特性。
AI.result: 发现了时空磁振子涡旋光束，其包含固定的相位缺陷，波以锯齿状路径传播。最显著的特征是相位缺陷携带的横向轨道角动量在空间上呈现交替变化。
AI.conclusion: 铁磁纳米带中的时空磁振子涡旋光束表现出与光子和声子对应物截然不同的特性，特别是其固定的相位缺陷和空间交替的横向轨道角动量，这为时空涡旋光束研究开辟了新领域。

title: Ferroaxial and nematic transitions in the charge density wave phase of 1T-TiSe$_2$
summary: Charge density waves (CDWs) with multi-component order parameters can break unexpected symmetries through the interplay of nearly degenerate instabilities. In the widely investigated material 1T-TiSe$_2$, a central question is whether the observed CDW has a chiral character, which would manifest as the spontaneous breaking of mirror and inversion symmetries. Previous experiments have reported conflicting results about the broken symmetries in the CDW phase of 1T-TiSe$_2$. Here, we resolve this controversy by identifying the bulk broken symmetry as ferroaxial, corresponding to the breaking of vertical mirrors while preserving inversion symmetry. Using symmetry-resolved elastoresistivity, we detect the spontaneous emergence of intrinsic off-diagonal elastoresistivity coefficients that satisfy an antisymmetric relation ($m_{xx-yy,xy} \approx -m_{xy,xx-yy}$), providing an unambiguous bulk transport signature of a macroscopic electric toroidal moment. Simultaneous elastocaloric measurements reveal that the onset of ferroaxial order occurs just below the CDW transition. As the temperature is lowered further, a diverging nematic susceptibility signals a distinct rotational symmetry-breaking instability inside the ferroaxial CDW state. Our findings demonstrate that the proposed ``chiral'' CDW in 1T-TiSe$_2$ is actually a centrosymmetric ferroaxial state, reconciling previous surface-sensitive observations with bulk symmetry constraints.

AI.tldr: 1T-TiSe₂中的电荷密度波（CDW）并非手性态，而是中心对称的铁轴态，打破了垂直镜面对称但保留了反演对称性。
AI.motivation: 解决关于1T-TiSe₂中CDW对称性破坏的争议，特别是关于其是否具有手性特征（同时打破镜面和反演对称性）的相互矛盾实验结果。
AI.method: 使用对称性分辨的弹性电阻率测量，检测自发出现的本征非对角弹性电阻率系数，这些系数满足反对称关系；同时进行弹性热测量来监测相变温度。
AI.result: 发现CDW态是铁轴态，在CDW转变温度以下自发出现，表现为宏观电环形矩的输运特征；在更低温度下，发散向列磁化率表明在铁轴CDW态内部存在旋转对称性破坏不稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 1T-TiSe₂中提出的"手性"CDW实际上是中心对称的铁轴态，这调和了先前表面敏感观测与体相对称性约束之间的矛盾。

title: Nonholonomic constraints at finite temperature
summary: We investigate the behavior of dynamical systems with nonholonomic constraints when coupled to a thermal bath, focusing on the paradigmatic case of the Chaplygin sleigh. A straightforward Langevin-type approach obtained by naively adding stochastic and dissipative terms to the equations of motion predicts a regime in which useful work can be extracted, violating the second law of thermodynamics. To resolve this paradox, we resort to a physically motivated implementation of the nonholonomic constraint as the limiting case of a viscous interaction. However, at finite temperature, fluctuation-dissipation relations imply that the viscous force has to be complemented with stochastic forces acting at the contact. We show that their incorporation restores compliance with the second law. Therefore, our results place fundamental limits on the physical realizability of idealized nonholonomic constraints.

AI.tldr: 研究非完整约束系统在热浴中的行为，发现简单朗之万方法会导致违反热力学第二定律的悖论，通过物理实现约束并考虑涨落耗散关系可恢复第二定律。
AI.motivation: 研究非完整约束系统（以Chaplygin雪橇为例）与热浴耦合时的行为，解决简单朗之万方法预测的违反热力学第二定律的悖论。
AI.method: 将非完整约束作为粘性相互作用的极限情况物理实现，在有限温度下考虑涨落耗散关系，在接触点补充随机力。
AI.result: 补充随机力后系统恢复符合热力学第二定律，揭示了理想化非完整约束在物理实现上的基本限制。
AI.conclusion: 非完整约束的理想化模型在热力学背景下需要谨慎处理，必须考虑涨落耗散关系才能保证物理一致性，这对非完整约束的物理实现提出了基本限制。

title: Generative Inverse Design of Cold Metals for Low-Power Electronics
summary: Cold metals are a class of metals with an intrinsic energy gap located close to the Fermi level, which enables cold-carrier injection for steep-slope transistors and is therefore promising for low-power electronic applications. High-throughput screening has revealed 252 three-dimensional (3D) cold metals in the Materials Project database, but database searches are inherently limited to known compounds. Here we present an inverse-design workflow that generates 3D cold metals using MatterGPT, a conditional autoregressive Transformer trained on SLICES, an invertible and symmetry-invariant crystal string representation. We curate a training set of 26,309 metallic structures labeled with energy above hull and a unified band-edge distance descriptor that merges p-type and n-type cold-metal characteristics to address severe label imbalance. Property-conditioned generation targeting thermodynamic stability and 50-500 meV band-edge distances produces 148,506 unique candidates; 92.1% are successfully reconstructed to 3D structures and down-selected by symmetry, uniqueness and novelty filters, followed by high-throughput DFT validation. We identify 257 cold metals verified as novel with respect to the Materials Project database, with gaps around the Fermi level spanning 50-500 meV. First-principles phonon, electronic-structure, and work-function calculations for representative candidates confirm dynamical stability and contact-relevant work functions. Our results demonstrate that SLICES-enabled generative transformers can expand the chemical space of cold metals beyond high-throughput screening, providing a route to low-power electronic materials discovery.

AI.tldr: 使用MatterGPT生成三维冷金属，通过逆设计工作流发现了257种新型冷金属，验证了生成模型在材料发现中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 冷金属具有接近费米能级的本征能隙，可用于陡坡晶体管和低功耗电子应用。传统高通量筛选局限于已知化合物，需要开发新方法来扩展冷金属的化学空间。
AI.method: 使用MatterGPT（基于SLICES晶体字符串表示的条件自回归Transformer）进行逆设计。训练集包含26,309个金属结构，使用统一能带边缘距离描述符处理标签不平衡问题。通过条件生成目标热力学稳定性和50-500 meV能带边缘距离，生成148,506个候选结构。
AI.result: 成功重构92.1%的候选结构，经过对称性、唯一性和新颖性筛选后，通过DFT验证发现了257种相对于Materials Project数据库全新的冷金属，能隙范围为50-500 meV。代表性候选物的第一性原理计算确认了动态稳定性和接触相关功函数。
AI.conclusion: 基于SLICES的生成Transformer能够超越高通量筛选，扩展冷金属的化学空间，为低功耗电子材料发现提供了新途径。

title: Universal tuning of quantum electrodynamic interactions from power laws to exponential screening and logarithmic antiscreening
summary: We introduce a material-agnostic platform for \emph{universal tuning of quantum electrodynamic interactions from power laws to exponential screening and logarithmic antiscreening}, realized in a dielectric spacer bounded by two gate-tunable two-dimensional conductors. The structured electromagnetic environment is completely specified by the transverse-magnetic and transverse-electric reflection amplitudes \(r_{\mathrm{TM/TE}}(q_\perp,ω)\) of the sheets. Starting from the QED action and a Green-function formulation, we resum the multiple-reflection series and show that the interactions are governed by a discrete set of transverse cavity harmonics. In the transparent limit \(r_{\rm TM}\to 0\), the interactions reduce to bulk power laws \(U(ρ)\propto ρ^{-α}\). In the reflective limit \(|r_{\rm TM}|\to 1\), the \emph{phase/parity} of \(r_{\rm TM}\) selects two qualitatively distinct branches: a Dirichlet/PEC (screening) branch \(r_{\rm TM}\to -1\) that removes the gapless transverse mode and yields an evanescent Bessel-\(K\) function \(U(ρ)\propto e^{-πρ/d}/\sqrt{ρ/d}\) at \(ρ\gg d\), and an opposite Neumann/PMC-like (antiscreening) branch \(r_{\rm TM}\to +1\) that retains a gapless mode and can strongly enhance the long-range tail. Thus, the same heterostructure provides in situ electrical control over both the \emph{range} and the \emph{strength} of mediated interactions.

AI.tldr: 提出一种材料无关的平台，通过可调二维导体实现量子电动力学相互作用的通用调控，从幂律到指数屏蔽和对数反屏蔽
AI.motivation: 传统量子电动力学相互作用通常具有固定的空间衰减特性（如幂律衰减），缺乏可调控性。需要一种能够动态控制相互作用范围和强度的通用平台
AI.method: 使用两个门可调的二维导体作为边界，中间夹着介电间隔层。通过格林函数方法重求和多重反射级数，将相互作用描述为离散的横向腔谐波
AI.result: 在透明极限下得到幂律相互作用U(ρ)∝ρ^{-α}；在反射极限下，根据r_TM的相位/宇称分为两个分支：Dirichlet/PEC分支产生指数衰减的贝塞尔函数，Neumann/PMC分支保留无能隙模式并增强长程尾部
AI.conclusion: 同一异质结构能够通过电控制同时调控相互作用的范围和强度，实现了从幂律到指数屏蔽和对数反屏蔽的通用可调量子电动力学相互作用平台

title: Acrylamide Conformers: A Revision of Published Density Functional Theory Studies
summary: Acrylamide, with PubChem identifier CID=6579 is broadcasted to have four stable conformers contrasting with several journal publications characterizing only two or three. In this revision summary the discrepancy is clarified. Through very high precision density functional theory (DFT) calculations, three stable conformers and the three transition state barriers existing between them are verified to exist and validated with our own DFT calculations The most stable conformer is a planar molecular structure termed "sys" or "trans" in the literature. Meanwhile, a less stable structure termed "skew" pertains to two 3-dimensional structures that are energy-degenerate, but differ in their structure for being mirrored images of each other. Vibrational spectra, partial atomic charges, Cartesian coordinates, and Intrinsic Reaction Coordinate paths are summarized and recalculated with DFT at the wB97XD/Def2TZVPP level for the three stable acrylamide isomers: the sys/trans lowest in energy structure, and the two skew mirrored structures.

AI.tldr: 通过高精度DFT计算确认丙烯酰胺存在三种稳定构象，而非文献中报道的两种或四种，并提供了详细的振动光谱、原子电荷等数据
AI.motivation: 澄清文献中关于丙烯酰胺稳定构象数量的不一致性（有的报道两种，有的报道三种或四种），通过高精度计算确定准确的构象数量
AI.method: 使用高精度密度泛函理论（DFT）计算，在wB97XD/Def2TZVPP水平上验证三种稳定构象和它们之间的三个过渡态能垒，重新计算振动光谱、原子电荷、笛卡尔坐标和本征反应坐标路径
AI.result: 确认丙烯酰胺存在三种稳定构象：最稳定的平面结构（sys/trans）和两个能量简并的三维镜像结构（skew），验证了三个构象之间的三个过渡态能垒
AI.conclusion: 丙烯酰胺实际上有三种稳定构象，而非文献中报道的两种或四种，这一发现澄清了先前研究中的不一致性，并为该分子的结构特性提供了准确描述

title: Giant anomalous Hall conductivity in frustrated magnet EuCo2Al9
comment: 15 pages, 5 figures. To appear in Materials Today
summary: The interaction between conduction electrons and localized magnetic moments profoundly influences the electrical and magnetic properties of materials, giving rise to a variety of fascinating physical phenomena and quantum effects. Here, we discover a giant anomalous Hall effect (AHE) in a frustrated Eu-based magnet, exhibiting a giant anomalous Hall conductivity (AHC) of 31000 Ω-1cm-1 and a remarkable anomalous Hall angle (AHA, tanθH) of 12 %--surpassing conventional mechanisms (either intrinsic or extrinsic) by two orders of magnitude. Combining magnetotransport, quantum oscillations, neutron diffraction and ab initio calculations, we establish that the giant AHC originates from fluctuating spin chirality skew scattering, generated by indirect Ruderman-Kittel-Kasuya-Yosida (RKKY) interactions of Eu-4f moments. Simultaneously, Hund's coupling of itinerant electrons and localized Eu-4f spins triggers giant exchange splitting, evidenced by temperature-dependent Fermi surface reconstruction. This work establishes a frustrated magnetic platform for engineering the AHE and elucidates the governing role of exchange interactions and spin textures in quantum transport, while also providing a framework for designing unconventional spintronic systems that harness emergent spin-texture dynamics.

AI.tldr: 在受挫Eu基磁体中发现了巨大的反常霍尔效应，其反常霍尔电导率达31000 Ω⁻¹cm⁻¹，反常霍尔角达12%，远超传统机制两个数量级。
AI.motivation: 研究传导电子与局域磁矩之间的相互作用对材料电学和磁学性质的影响，探索新的量子效应和物理现象。
AI.method: 结合磁输运测量、量子振荡、中子衍射和第一性原理计算，分析Eu-4f磁矩的间接RKKY相互作用和Hund耦合效应。
AI.result: 发现巨大的反常霍尔效应源于自旋手性偏散射，由Eu-4f磁矩的间接RKKY相互作用产生；同时Hund耦合导致巨大的交换劈裂和温度依赖的费米面重构。
AI.conclusion: 建立了受挫磁性平台用于调控反常霍尔效应，阐明了交换相互作用和自旋织构在量子输运中的主导作用，为设计利用新兴自旋织构动力学的非常规自旋电子系统提供了框架。

title: First-return time in fractional kinetics
summary: The first-return time is the time that it takes a random walker to go back to the initial position for the first time. We study the first-return time when random walkers perform fractional kinetics, specifically fractional diffusion, that is modelled within the framework of the continuous-time random walk on homogeneous space in the uncoupled formulation with Mittag-Leffler distributed waiting-times. We consider both Markovian and non-Markovian settings, as well as any kind of symmetric jump-size distributions, namely with finite or infinite variance. We show that the first-return time density is indeed independent of the jump-size distribution when it is symmetric, and therefore it is affected only by the waiting-time distribution that embodies the memory of the process. We perform our analysis in two cases: first jump then wait and first wait then jump, and we provide several exact results, including the relation between results in the Markovian and non-Markovian settings and the difference between the two cases.

AI.tldr: 研究分数动力学随机游走首次返回时间的统计特性，发现首次返回时间密度仅依赖于等待时间分布，与对称跳跃大小分布无关。
AI.motivation: 研究分数动力学（特别是分数扩散）框架下随机游走首次返回时间的统计特性，探索马尔可夫和非马尔可夫设置以及不同跳跃大小分布的影响。
AI.method: 在连续时间随机游走框架下，使用Mittag-Leffler分布等待时间，考虑对称跳跃大小分布（有限或无限方差），分析"先跳后等"和"先等后跳"两种情况。
AI.result: 首次返回时间密度仅依赖于等待时间分布，与对称跳跃大小分布无关；提供了马尔可夫和非马尔可夫设置之间的关系以及两种情况差异的精确结果。
AI.conclusion: 分数动力学随机游走的首次返回时间统计特性主要由等待时间分布决定，反映了过程的记忆特性，而与跳跃大小分布的细节无关。

title: Non-isothermal flow of Al-, Co- and Cu-based alloys made in different spatial configurations or structural states: model and experimental study
summary: The universal generalising approach for non-isothermal behaviour of different alloys has been provided together with the novel deformation modelling. Strong correlation between the model approach and experimental results is shown that permits estimation of main applied parameters such as the linear thermal expansion coefficient and others. Necking contours and critical thickness at corrugation for ribbon and rod specimens are also calculated. Fractal analysis of corrugation folds (their main size) has been carried out for polycrystalline and amorphous ribbon specimens. Structural peculiarities at the plastic deformation stage are investigated with microscopy.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种通用的非等温行为建模方法，用于不同合金材料，并展示了与实验结果的强相关性，可估算热膨胀系数等关键参数。
AI.motivation: 开发一种通用的建模方法来描述不同合金在非等温条件下的变形行为，以更好地理解和预测材料在实际应用中的性能表现。
AI.method: 采用创新的变形建模方法，结合实验验证，计算颈缩轮廓和临界厚度，并进行褶皱的分形分析，同时利用显微镜研究塑性变形阶段的结构特征。
AI.result: 模型与实验结果显示出强相关性，能够准确估算线性热膨胀系数等关键参数，成功计算了带状和棒状试样的颈缩轮廓和临界厚度，并揭示了多晶和非晶带状试样褶皱的分形特征。
AI.conclusion: 该通用建模方法有效描述了不同合金的非等温变形行为，为材料性能预测和工程应用提供了可靠的理论工具。

title: Moiré Ferroelectricity-Driven Band Engineering in Twisted Square Bilayers
summary: We develop the moiré band theory for M-valley twisted square homobilayers with layer groups $P$-$42m$ and $P$-$4m2$, and propose candidate material realizations. We show that moiré ferroelectricity-originating from sliding ferroelectricity in the untwisted bilayers-provides an independent control knob for miniband engineering in addition to interlayer tunneling. The competition between these two effects enables controlled switching between layer-resolved bilayer minibands and an effective single isolated miniband. Remarkably, these systems exhibit an emergent momentum-space nonsymmorphic symmetry in the absence of external magnetic fields. Large-scale \emph{ab initio} calculations identify Cu$_2$WS$_4$ and GeCl$_2$ as representative materials realizing the ferroelectricity- and tunneling-dominated regimes, respectively. Our results establish twisted square homobilayers as a promising platform for correlated band engineering beyond moiré hexagonal systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文开发了具有P-42m和P-4m2层群的M谷扭曲方形同质双层膜的莫尔能带理论，提出候选材料实现，展示了莫尔铁电性作为独立调控手段，可实现层分辨双层微带与有效单层微带之间的可控切换。
AI.motivation: 超越传统莫尔六角系统的相关能带工程，探索扭曲方形同质双层膜作为新的平台，利用莫尔铁电性提供独立于层间隧穿的额外调控维度。
AI.method: 开发了M谷扭曲方形同质双层膜的莫尔能带理论，结合大规模第一性原理计算，以Cu₂WS₄和GeCl₂为代表材料分别研究铁电性主导和隧穿主导的两种机制。
AI.result: 发现莫尔铁电性可作为独立调控手段，与层间隧穿竞争可实现层分辨双层微带与有效单层微带之间的可控切换；系统在无外磁场下表现出涌现的动量空间非对称性对称性；确定了Cu₂WS₄和GeCl₂分别代表铁电性和隧穿主导的两种机制。
AI.conclusion: 扭曲方形同质双层膜是超越莫尔六角系统的有前景的相关能带工程平台，莫尔铁电性提供了新的调控维度，为可控能带工程开辟了新途径。

title: Non-Abelian fractional Chern insulators from an exactly solvable two-body model
summary: We construct a class of lattice Hamiltonians whose single-particle spectrum consists of an arbitrary number of exactly degenerate flat bands that reproduce the analytic structure of the first $p$ Landau levels restricted to the lattice. When combined with local bosonic contact interactions, these models become exactly solvable frustration-free parent Hamiltonians for FCIs that realize both Abelian and non-Abelian parton quantum Hall states. Using exact diagonalization, we confirm the expected zero-mode counting for variants of the model stabilizing the bosonic Jain-21 state as well as the non-Abelian 22- and 33-states, which are expected to support Ising- and Fibonacci-type anyons, respectively. Our construction provides an exactly solvable lattice realization of multi Landau-level physics and offers a new framework for studying FCIs with Chern number $C > 1$. More broadly, it supplies a family of idealized lattice models that capture the analytic structure of continuum Landau levels while remaining compatible with exponentially local hopping.

AI.tldr: 构建具有任意数量精确简并平带的晶格哈密顿量，重现连续朗道能级的解析结构，为分数陈绝缘体提供精确可解模型
AI.motivation: 在晶格系统中实现连续朗道能级的物理特性，为研究陈数大于1的分数陈绝缘体提供理想化模型框架
AI.method: 构造一类晶格哈密顿量，其单粒子谱包含任意数量的精确简并平带，重现前p个朗道能级的解析结构；结合局域玻色接触相互作用，得到精确可解的无阻挫父哈密顿量
AI.result: 通过精确对角化验证了模型对玻色Jain-21态以及非阿贝尔22-和33-态的零模计数，这些态分别支持Ising型和Fibonacci型任意子
AI.conclusion: 该构造提供了多朗道能级物理的精确可解晶格实现，为研究C>1的分数陈绝缘体提供了新框架，同时保持了指数局域跳跃的兼容性

title: Observation-Time-Induced Crossover in Driven Anomalous Transport
summary: We investigate how a weak constant force becomes detectable through fluctuations in anomalous transport in strongly heterogeneous media. Rather than focusing on the mean drift, we show that the key signature of the force appears in the variance of the particle displacement. As representative models, we study a biased continuous-time random walk (CTRW) with nearest-neighbor jumps and a biased quenched trap model (QTM) with a power-law waiting-time tail. By analysing the force dependence of the displacement variance, we quantify how fluctuations respond to weak driving. We find that for $α<2$, the response exhibits an observation-time-induced crossover: at fixed bias, the variance initially follows its unbiased scaling and only at later times crosses over to a force-dominated nonequilibrium regime. Equivalently, at fixed observation time $t$, there exists a threshold bias $\varepsilon_c(t)$ separating an apparently equilibrium-like regime from a detectable nonequilibrium response. This threshold decreases with increasing $t$, implying that weaker forces become observable over longer measurement windows. Quenched disorder further lowers the detection threshold compared with CTRW, and the crossover reflects a competition between the finite observation time and the intrinsic relaxation time of the driven heterogeneous system.

AI.tldr: 研究弱恒定力在强异质介质异常输运中如何通过涨落被检测到，发现力的关键特征出现在粒子位移方差中而非平均漂移。
AI.motivation: 在强异质介质中，弱力难以通过平均漂移检测，因此需要探索其他检测方法。研究旨在理解弱力如何通过涨落特征在异常输运中变得可观测。
AI.method: 采用两种代表性模型：带偏置的连续时间随机游走（CTRW）和带偏置的淬火陷阱模型（QTM）。分析位移方差的力依赖性，量化涨落对弱驱动的响应。
AI.result: 当α<2时，响应表现出观测时间诱导的交叉：在固定偏置下，方差最初遵循无偏标度，仅在后期时间过渡到力主导的非平衡状态。存在阈值偏置ε_c(t)分离表观平衡态和可检测的非平衡响应，该阈值随时间增加而降低。淬火无序进一步降低了检测阈值。
AI.conclusion: 弱力在强异质介质中通过位移方差的涨落特征变得可检测，检测阈值随观测时间增加而降低，淬火无序增强了弱力的可观测性，交叉反映了有限观测时间与驱动异质系统本征弛豫时间之间的竞争。

title: Linear dichroic soft X-ray microscopy of ferroelectric stripe domains in epitaxial K$_\mathbf{0.6}$Na$_\mathbf{0.4}$NbO$_\mathbf{3}$
summary: Functional properties of ferroelectric thin films are governed by domains that can be engineered by epitaxial strain. Soft X-ray microscopy can image domain structures with elemental and electronic sensitivity, but hitherto its application to strain-stabilized domains has been hindered by the absorption of soft X-rays in epitaxial substrates. Here, it is demonstrated how this limitation can be overcome by locally back-thinning the (110) TbScO$_3$ substrate of epitaxial K$_{0.6}$Na$_{0.4}$NbO$_3$ ferroelectric thin films to achieve soft X-ray transparency at the O K-edge around 530 eV. Strain-induced ferroelectric stripe domains with periods down to 44 nm were resolved by scanning transmission X-ray microscopy and coherent diffractive imaging by exploiting the X-ray linear dichroism of hybridized O 2p-Nb 4d states, providing sensitivity to in-plane polarization components under normal incidence. The results establish soft X-ray microscopy for nanoscale imaging of epitaxial ferroelectric domains structures and open perspectives for time-resolved studies thereof.

AI.tldr: 该论文开发了一种通过局部背减薄衬底实现软X射线显微镜对铁电薄膜应变稳定畴结构成像的方法。
AI.motivation: 软X射线显微镜具有元素和电子敏感性，可用于成像铁电畴结构，但传统上受限于软X射线在衬底中的吸收，无法应用于应变稳定畴的研究。
AI.method: 通过局部背减薄TbScO3衬底，使软X射线在530 eV的O K-edge处透明，利用扫描透射X射线显微镜和相干衍射成像，基于O 2p-Nb 4d态杂化的X射线线性二色性来成像畴结构。
AI.result: 成功成像了应变诱导的铁电条纹畴，周期低至44 nm，能够在垂直入射条件下敏感探测面内极化分量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法建立了软X射线显微镜在纳米尺度成像外延铁电畴结构的应用，为时间分辨研究开辟了新前景。

title: Spin-valley physics in anomalous thermoelectric responses of the spin-orbit coupled $α$-$T_3$ system with broken time-reversal symmetry
summary: We extract spin-valley physics in the anomalous Hall and Nernst responses of the spin-orbit coupled $α$-$T_3$ system in the presence of a time-reversal symmetry breaking staggered magnetization. We show that the interplay between the SOI, magnetization, and a model parameter $α$ for the $α$-$T_3$ lattice enables efficient tuning of spin- and valley-dependent Hall and Nernst signals. The spin-valley physics of the Hall and Nernst responses in the absence and presence of the magnetization are well explained. The peak-dip features of the Nernst responses are also understood from the corresponding Hall responses through the Mott relation. We find that the magnetization introduces highly tunable spin and valley polarizations, which are calculated from the spin- and valley-resolved Nernst conductivities. It is shown that both the spin and valley polarizations can attain nearly complete polarization over extended regions of the parameter space. Overall, our results highlight the $α$-$T_3$ lattice as a promising platform for spin and valley caloritronic applications.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了α-T₃系统中自旋-谷物理在反常霍尔和能斯特响应中的表现，通过调控自旋轨道耦合、磁化和晶格参数α，实现了高效的自旋和谷极化调控。
AI.motivation: 探索α-T₃晶格作为自旋和谷热电子学应用平台的潜力，研究时间反演对称性破缺的磁化如何影响自旋-谷相关的霍尔和能斯特响应。
AI.method: 在α-T₃系统中引入自旋轨道耦合和时间反演对称性破缺的磁化，通过模型参数α调控系统特性，分析自旋和谷分辨的霍尔与能斯特电导率，利用Mott关系解释响应特征。
AI.result: 磁化引入了高度可调的自旋和谷极化，两者在参数空间的广泛区域内都能达到接近完全的极化；能斯特响应的峰-谷特征可通过相应的霍尔响应通过Mott关系得到解释。
AI.conclusion: α-T₃晶格是自旋和谷热电子学应用的有前景平台，通过调控自旋轨道耦合、磁化和晶格参数α，可以实现高效的自旋和谷极化调控。

title: Scaling Autoregressive Models for Lattice Thermodynamics
summary: Predicting how materials behave under realistic conditions requires understanding the statistical distribution of atomic configurations on crystal lattices, a problem central to alloy design, catalysis, and the study of phase transitions. Traditional Markov-chain Monte Carlo sampling suffers from slow convergence and critical slowing down near phase transitions, motivating the use of generative models that directly learn the thermodynamic distribution. Existing autoregressive models (ARMs), however, generate configurations in a fixed sequential order and incur high memory and training costs, limiting their applicability to realistic systems. Here, we develop a framework combining any-order ARMs, which generate configurations flexibly by conditioning on any known subset of lattice sites, with marginalization models (MAMs), which approximate the probability of any partial configuration in a single forward pass and substantially reduce memory requirements. This combination enables models trained on smaller lattices to be reused for sampling larger systems, while supporting expressive Transformer architectures with lattice-aware positional encodings at manageable computational cost. We demonstrate that Transformer-based any-order MAMs achieve more accurate free energies than multilayer perceptron-based ARMs on both the two-dimensional Ising model and CuAu alloys, faithfully capturing phase transitions and critical behavior. Overall, our framework scales from $10 \times 10$ to $20 \times 20$ Ising systems and from $2 \times 2 \times 4$ to $4 \times 4 \times 8$ CuAu supercells at reduced computational cost compared to conventional sampling methods.

AI.tldr: 提出结合任意顺序自回归模型和边缘化模型的框架，用于高效学习晶体格点原子构型的统计分布，克服传统采样方法的收敛慢和计算成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛采样在相变附近收敛慢且存在临界减速问题，现有自回归模型生成顺序固定、内存和训练成本高，限制了在实际系统中的应用。
AI.method: 结合任意顺序自回归模型（可灵活生成构型）和边缘化模型（单次前向传播近似部分构型概率），使用Transformer架构和晶格感知位置编码，降低内存需求。
AI.result: Transformer基任意顺序边缘化模型在二维Ising模型和CuAu合金上比多层感知机基自回归模型获得更精确的自由能，准确捕捉相变和临界行为。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能以较低计算成本从较小晶格扩展到较大系统，支持表达性强的Transformer架构，为材料行为预测提供高效采样方法。

title: Anomalous and Topological Hall Effects in Antiferromagnetic EuSn2As2 Nanostructures
summary: We investigate magnetotransport in exfoliated nanostructures of the candidate magnetic 3D topological insulator $\mathrm{EuSn_{2}As_{2}}$.
